programme.title: Splash and Bubbles: One Big Ocean
programme.desc: Splash and his friends meet Scoot, a young and mischievous sea turtle who is riding the currents.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Eagle Egg Hunt/ Dream Tube
programme.desc: A gust of wind spins a wildlife camera away from an eagle’s nest on hatching day. Molly and friends have their eye on a spectacular water tube for sale at the Trading Post, but they don’t have enough money to buy it.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: I Am Isaac Newton/ I Am Golda Meir
programme.desc: Xavier and his friends go back in time to meet Sir Isaac Newton, an expert in the laws of motion.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: Hola Mariachi/ Loco for Cocoa
programme.desc: Leo, Carmen, and Andy help return a lost cocoa bean to a friend's mother in Mexico City.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: Peanut Problem/ More Adventures of Robin Hood
programme.desc: George Washington Carver will have a total of one hundred peanut-based inventions, if Peg and Cat can catch the tiny tricksters who keep swiping them. When a greedy Pig shows up next door, Peg and Cat summon Robin Hood to their neighborhood.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Daniel's Tiger Twirl/ You Can Play Your Own Way
programme.desc: At the Neighbourhood Carnival, Miss Elaina shows off her cartwheel trick, but when Daniel tries, he can't do a cartwheel like the one Miss Elaina did; Miss Elaina gets upset when Jodi keeps copying everything she does.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Elmo Goes to Chicken School
programme.desc: Elmo helps Professor Buck Awe teach a class of chickens using strategies he learned in preschool.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Face Painting/ Sailing Away
programme.desc: Peter thinks he's too short to do fun activities as well as Pinkalicious or Rafael, so he makes shoes that let you jump really high! But he and Pinkalicious will need to learn how to jump properly if they're going to make it to the park.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Tarts
programme.desc: Watch the remaining 10 bakers try to wow Paul and Mary with unusual flavor combinations in tartes tartins. A treacle tart in the Technical seems simple, but proves the downfall of some. Producing a Showstopper under the judges' gaze is no easy task.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic
programme.desc: The best adaptations of classical works and literature are featured.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Howards End
programme.desc: A misunderstanding, a surprise visit, and a stolen umbrella lead to a series of events that intertwine the lives of the Schlegel, Wilcox and Bast families.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Justice
programme.desc: Sex crimes haunt a judge in and out of the courtroom after his stepdaughter is murdered.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Greed
programme.desc: The detectives investigate when an entrepreneur's wife is found bludgeoned and raped.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Imprisoned Lives
programme.desc: A young boy is abandoned in Times Square and leads detectives to the house where his family lives. Inside they find a locked basement where more victims await rescue, and work to solve decades-old cold cases.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Wonderland Story
programme.desc: A woman wakes up after partying all night and believes she has been raped. In shock that it could happen again, she calls Detective Benson who handled her previous rape case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Military Justice
programme.desc: A junior officer is arrested for DUI while on leave, but her ripped clothes lead officers to call Benson for help. When a group of soldiers in her unit are named for the rape, she refuses to cooperate with SVU.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Psycho/ Therapist
programme.desc: The trial of William Lewis once again pits Detective Benson against her attacker and she is forced to reveal some of the secrets she kept about her ordeal.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Wednesday's Child
programme.desc: A young diabetic boy goes missing from his bed, and time is running out to get him insulin. A criminal couple known for producing child pornography is spotted with the boy, but they are not willing to help the investigation.

programme.title: The Biggest Loser: First Look
programme.desc: A first look at USA's 'The Biggest Loser.'

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Gridiron Soldier
programme.desc: A high school football star goes missing in New York City, and his uncle turns to Rollins for help. The missing boy turns up in jail, and detectives suspect a cruel prank that spiralled out of control.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Downloaded Child
programme.desc: Single mom Jenny is arrested for child endangerment. Not trusting anyone to take care of her young daughter, she leaves her home alone for days. Jenny's fierce motherly instincts and fear of men leads Benson to believe she is the victim of abuse.

programme.title: Dare Me: Surrender at Discretion
programme.desc: As Addy gets closer to Colette, Beth takes drastic action to regain control of the squad.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Looking Out for Stateville
programme.desc: Voight convinces Deputy Crowley to bring in his former cellmate, Eddie, as a CI for the unit in order to help bring down a big-time cocaine supplier and his local dealers.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Hit Me
programme.desc: Lindsay goes undercover in an effort to track down a rogue police officer targeting women leaving a local casino.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Night Owl
programme.desc: While working at a sobriety checkpoint, Burgess finds a duffle bag full of heroin in the truck of a respected college professor who claims to know nothing about how the drugs ended up there.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Cases That Need to Be Solved
programme.desc: When a young boy is executed, Intelligence turns to the boy's parents for information. Upon further investigation, they discover the boy's father has a criminal background and was part of a local gang.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Recipe for Murder
programme.desc: The team scours a restaurant's kitchen for clues as to who may have murdered the chef.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Reign Fall
programme.desc: Sam reflects on his own upbringing and relationship with his father when the team investigates the murders of marines who have sons in military academies.

programme.title: NCIS: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team investigate when an ailing navy lieutenant, who is an inspector for the International Atomic Energy Agency, may be the victim of radiation poisoning. Meanwhile, Tony is surprised when he sees a softer side of Ziva.

programme.title: NCIS: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: The team suspects Gibbs' arch-nemesis is behind an explosion at a summit for global terror event but Gibbs elects to sit out the investigation in order to help Fornell deal with his wife's murder.

programme.title: NCIS: Blast From the Past
programme.desc: A covert identity created for one of Gibbs' undercover cases 20 years ago resurfaces after a murder victim is found living under the alias.

programme.title: NCIS: The Artful Dodger
programme.desc: Evidence in an NCIS murder case reveals a rare painting on loan had been swapped for a fake, prompting DiNozzo, Sr., to share his knowledge and contacts on the black market art world with the team.

programme.title: NCIS: Status Update
programme.desc: After the body of a thief is found in a marine's house, the team discovers the calling card of a terror group Delilah and the Department of Defense have been tracking.

programme.title: NCIS: Patience

programme.title: NCIS: No Good Deed

programme.title: NCIS: Lost in Translation

programme.desc: Frasier agrees to write the introduction to a new book by a pretty psychologist. After reading the book, he realizes he can't endorse it, but he's too attracted to the author to turn her down.

programme.title: Frasier: The Show Where Sam Shows Up
programme.desc: Frasier's old friend from Boston, Sam Malone, turns up in Seattle to reminisce. Sam soon reveals that he was supposed to have gotten married the previous day, but couldn't go through with it, so Frasier sets out to solve his problems.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Freezer
programme.desc: Lucy has an economy fit and buys a freezer, which puts a crimp on the household economy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Does a TV Commercial
programme.desc: Lucy tricks Ricky into letting her do a television commercial with hilarious results.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Publicity Agent
programme.desc: Lucy represents herself to reporters as an exotic princess.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Gets Ricky on the Radio
programme.desc: Lucy is so impressed at Ricky's correct answers to a radio quiz show that she gets him on the show as a contestant.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?
programme.desc: After Miles gives Rose a friendship ring, Rose becomes convinced Charlie is trying to contact her from the grave with the message that he disproves of her relationship with Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Motherload
programme.desc: Blanche begins dating a newscaster who has another woman interfering in his life: his mother. Meanwhile, Stan asks Dorothy to attend a counseling session with him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dateline, Miami
programme.desc: On a Saturday night when Dorothy is the only one with a date, the other girls are prompted to reminisce about some of the worst dates they have ever had.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Loves Miles
programme.desc: Rose has had it with Miles' penny pinching ways and decides to take Blanche's advice and go out with her and some big spenders. Meanwhile, Blanche has been left in charge of Sophia while Dorothy is away.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Kaitlin Doubleday from the Hallmark Channel original movie 'Love on Iceland' visits. Lisa Vanderpump and 'From Freezer to Table' authors Polly Conner and Rachel Tiemeyer also joins the show.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actor Dylan Neal from the Hallmark Movies and Mysteries original 'Roux the Day: A Gourmet Detective Mystery' visits. Then, actor Rob Lowe and 'Get a Clue' host Rob Belushi stop by.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweeter Side of Life
programme.desc: A woman is left penniless after her divorce, and though she wants nothing more than to return to her high-class life, spending time with her father in her hometown causes her to see things differently.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: A documentary-style look at the daily lives of office workers at a mid-sized paper company.

programme.title: The Office: Safety Training
programme.desc: Andy returns to the office after several weeks of anger management training, determined to make a fresh start with all the Dunder-Mifflin employees. On safety training day, Michael and Dwight try to illuminate the true dangers of the workplace.

programme.title: The Office: Product Recall
programme.desc: The office is in crisis mode after a large shipment of Dunder-Mifflin paper is accidentally sent out with an obscene watermark. In an effort to manage the media, Michael holds an impromptu press conference.

programme.title: The Office: Women's Appreciation
programme.desc: After Phyllis gets flashed in the parking lot, Dwight sets out to improve on-site security. Michael uses the situation as a pretence to bond with the female employees at the mall and to get advice on how to break up with Jan.

programme.title: The Office: Beach Games
programme.desc: Michael is being considered for a job at corporate and has to recommend his replacement.

programme.title: The Office: The Job
programme.desc: The office is still buzzing from the events of their day at the beach. A job opening in Corporate pits coworker against coworker as Michael, Jim and Karen all head to New York for final interviews.

programme.title: The Office: The Job
programme.desc: The office is still buzzing from the events of their day at the beach. A job opening in Corporate pits coworker against coworker as Michael, Jim and Karen all head to New York for final interviews.

programme.title: The Office: Fun Run
programme.desc: A freak accident causes Michael to believe the office is cursed. He explores the religious beliefs of his employees before deciding to hold a charity fun run. Meanwhile, developments in the romances of Pam and Jim, and Dwight and Angela are explored.

programme.title: Drunk History: Drunk Mystery
programme.desc: A look into the disappearance of Agatha Christie, the anonymous, letter writing terrorizer of Circleville and the figure behind the only unsolved airplane hijacking in America. Features Kirsten Dunst, Vanessa Bayer and Taran Killam.

programme.title: Drunk History: Drunk Mystery II
programme.desc: Columnist James Callender winds up dead; a producer dies on a yacht; Ken McElroy is murdered.

programme.desc: The body of a long-missing, young gang member is found.

programme.title: The Closer: Saving Face

programme.title: The Closer: Ruby
programme.desc: A recently released sex offender is accused of kidnapping a child, and with time running out, Det. Gabriel goes too far. Deputy Chief Johnson must deal with Gabriel and also get the pedophile to confess.

programme.title: The King of Queens: The Shmenkmans
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie embark on a campaign to find new friends without kids to worry about.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Surprise Artie
programme.desc: Carrie asks Doug to distract Arthur while she prepares a surprise birthday party.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Wild Cards

programme.title: The King of Queens: Big Dougie
programme.desc: Feeling the need to volunteer his time, Doug becomes a Big Brother and attempts a 10K run.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Soft Touch
programme.desc: Doug realizes that his neighbour has suckered him into a pyramid scheme.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Restaurant Row
programme.desc: Carrie bans Doug from going to his favourite restaurant because the staff is so rude.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Flower Power
programme.desc: Doug tries to prove that he is romantic when Carrie is jealous of a co-worker's flowers.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Whine Country
programme.desc: A coin toss will decide whether Doug and Carrie vacation in Paris or on the open road.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Murdered Boss
programme.desc: Celebrity real estate broker Linda Stein served New York's elite, but when she's found dead in her apartment, investigators are faced with a slew of powerful potential suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Deadly Ambition
programme.desc: A shooting at the University of Alabama Huntsville leaves three professors dead and the community questioning how they missed a murderer in their midst.

programme.title: True Crime Live

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: What Killed Heath Ledger?
programme.desc: Whether Heath Ledger's immersion into the role of 'The Joker' impacted his personal life and strange drawings and clues found in his apartment are investigated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Double Proof Double Cross
programme.desc: Tickle takes on his first big run of outlaw shine in over six years, but a new still design throws a wrench in the works. Mark and Huck seek a buyer willing to pay more for less. Daniel recovers from an on-the-job injury only to find he's been replaced.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Enemy at the Gates
programme.desc: Teaming up with a former competitor, Mark and Digger sell their legacy shine in a neighbouring county. Mike and Jerry double their shine output only to find customers are getting their shine from another source. Mountain man Mark tracks an intruder.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Wedding Cake Shine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt their first backwoods miracle, turning wedding cake into moonshine. Tickle scrambles for cover when aerial surveillance threatens a return to jail. And Appalachia's most accident-prone shiner is back operating heavy machinery.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Drone vs. Shotgun
programme.desc: Josh breaks into his secret stash to build a new still site, and breaks out his shotgun when a drone invades his airspace. Daniel hits the jackpot selling for Mark and Digger, while Mike finds his steady customers mysteriously less thirsty than usual.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Busted by the Law
programme.desc: With Extra Shine and bonus scenes: Tim hatches a plan to make backwoods shine with Tickle for the first time in years. Mark and Digger's bootleg operation comes under threat. In a series first, Tennessee shiners get busted on camera by cops.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Toxic Work Environment
programme.desc: Tickle's carpentry skills shine as Virginia outlaws plan a risky mod to their still. Mark and Digger take a big swing on a small ingredient that can't pass the sniff test. Josh digs deep and uncovers the worst way to foster a toxic work environment.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Python Tourniquet
programme.desc: While Dusty and the team stave off the spreading invasion by creating a 'tourniquet' at the Stormwater Treatment Areas, Gary lobbies to go down south and hunt for a new record-breaker.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Lightning Strikes
programme.desc: Moonshine setbacks are the order of the day. Josh hopes to take on a partner while Mark and Digger erect the cornerstone of their massive 3-pot still. Patti and David hunt for clean swamp water and Mike works solo to fulfill and order.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Toxic Work Environment
programme.desc: Tickle's carpentry skills shine as Virginia outlaws plan a risky mod to their still. Mark and Digger take a big swing on a small ingredient that can't pass the sniff test. Josh digs deep and uncovers the worst way to foster a toxic work environment.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Python Tourniquet
programme.desc: While Dusty and the team stave off the spreading invasion by creating a 'tourniquet' at the Stormwater Treatment Areas, Gary lobbies to go down south and hunt for a new record-breaker.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle Goes Rogue
programme.desc: Tickle goes it alone after his still hand Howard gets spooked by an intruder and disappears. Meanwhile, Josh and Bill discover toxic black mould in their underground still site, and Jeff's wife and son set up a second still to run barley scotch.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: An angry landowner busts Tickle, while Tim devises an ingenious new hiding spot for his backup stash of shine. Josh and Bill get into a bone-breaking fight at their new still site, and Mark bootlegs moonshine by canoe in the dead of night.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Shiners on Shine: Bootlegging
programme.desc: Master shiners Tim, Tickle, Mark and Digger sit down to discuss bootlegging; a tradition as old as the moonshining craft itself. They're reminiscing about their biggest hauls, closest brushes with the law and revealing their favorite tactics of evasion.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Shiners on Shine: Close Calls
programme.desc: No strangers to risking their lives and freedom for one of the country's most dangerous traditions, Tim, Tickle, Mark and Digger look back on their closest calls while braving the harsh wilds and the law to keep the shine flowing.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Shiners on Shine: Fails
programme.desc: Tim, Tickle, Mark and Digger relive their greatest muck ups from rookie mistakes to season sinking disasters.

programme.title: Dual Survival: On the Edge
programme.desc: Lost on a perilous ridgeline, at 15,000 feet above sea level, Joe and Matt are forced to descend slippery cliffs through extreme weather conditions, where altitude sickness and hypothermia threaten, and life-preserving fire eludes them.

programme.title: Dual Survival: End of the Road
programme.desc: Stranded deep in the jungle of Vietnam, Joe and Matt take on a real world survival scenario in untamed terrain, but even their expertise can't change the fact that they're up against the hottest and most humid month of the year in South East Asia.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Mayan Mayhem
programme.desc: Trapped in a labyrinth of underground tunnels, Joe and Matt facedown darkness and risk drowning only to emerge on surface and find an inhospitable jungle. Their opposing approaches to survival pit them against one another before bringing them to rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: One Shot, One Kill
programme.desc: Lost in a land that time forgot, New Zealand's Fiordland, Joe and Matt face a seemingly ordinary scenario of two hunters following their target into unfamiliar territory, but this time, they've only got one chance to get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: No Man Is an Island
programme.desc: Joe sets-off on a mission to locate his new partner, who is on an uninhabited island off the coast of Panama. Using his tracking skills, Joe locates Matt Graham and together they face their first survival situation: getting off of a remote Pacific island.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Deadly Dunes
programme.desc: Marooned in a sea of sand dunes, Joe and Cody traverse the unforgiving desert and trek deep into the mountains of Oman. Threatened by dehydration and heatstroke, their journey shows how nomads have survived for millennia in this hyper-arid land.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Glacial Downfall
programme.desc: On a glacier and clinging to opposite ends of a rope, Joe and Cody face their most challenging rescue scenario ever. The frozen landscape brings Joe and Cody's opposing survival styles to the forefront of this journey.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Beyond the Bush
programme.desc: The Wolfpack gathers and gets candid about untold secrets and burning questions that fans have wondered for years. From epic adventure to major struggles, they expose their world like never before.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wind and Water
programme.desc: The Brown Family kicks off their most ambitious plan to conquer the mountain yet. Bear and the siblings throw caution to the wind on a critical first project disassembling and transporting a salvaged 50-foot windmill.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Fashionably Late
programme.desc: While Randy's in Barcelona showing his second collection, Chelsea's princess dream dress goes missing from the store and crazy rich Asian bride Cheryl finds fault with every gown she sees.

programme.title: Hot & Heavy: Mixed Weight Love

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Camo Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete goes commando for a treehouse build for clients passionate for competition and survivalist games. In a grove of 10 hackberry trees, Pete designs a camouflage structure with a luxurious interior that could pamper any hardened champion.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: The Owl Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete pushes his design-skills to create an owl-inspired treehouse library in Charlotte, NC. Evoking the face of the bird and using all sorts of curves, including rounded walls and semi-circle bookcases, the NTS crew constructs a one-of-a-kind masterpiece.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Semper Fi in the Sky
programme.desc: Pete answers the call of duty to build a treehouse in Pennsylvania that focuses on the children of Marines. Cargo netting off the deck provides an exciting way to enter, while even more nets inside form a bridge to access a private loft space.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Climb-in Drive-In
programme.desc: Pete tackles the first ever climb-in movie theater. Concessions are served to seating pods through a pulley system, and loungers elevate into the trees to give perfect views of the big screen. Pete travels to build a treehouse for monkeys at the LA Zoo.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl: Inside the Bowl: The First Ever Field Goal
programme.desc: We're recounting the greatest moments from all the furry-ious years of puppies at play.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Branched Out: Shore-side Structures
programme.desc: Waterfront property is one thing, but a waterfront treehouse is a different game. Pete is off to bring the best of both worlds to a few new customers.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Boneyard Makeover
programme.desc: The team transforms the Boneyard by enclosing part of their shed with walls so they can work year-round, finishing off their new workspace by covering one wall with multi-colored barn wood.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Good Neighbors
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take down a dangerous barn for their new neighbours and build a replica of Abraham Lincoln's boyhood cabin. Graham learns to make bentwood furniture, and the teams visit a stunning opera house.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Branched Out: Shore-side Structures
programme.desc: Waterfront property is one thing, but a waterfront treehouse is a different game. Pete is off to bring the best of both worlds to a few new customers.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Boneyard Makeover
programme.desc: The team transforms the Boneyard by enclosing part of their shed with walls so they can work year-round, finishing off their new workspace by covering one wall with multi-colored barn wood.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Good Neighbors
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take down a dangerous barn for their new neighbours and build a replica of Abraham Lincoln's boyhood cabin. Graham learns to make bentwood furniture, and the teams visit a stunning opera house.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Mindbending Silver Maple
programme.desc: Inspired by tales of a time long past, Pete builds a treehouse cradled by the stems of a twisty silver maple on the shore of Lake Chelan. The cedar-shingled structure has a curved turret that soars two storeys high and a deck to take in views of the lake.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Levitating Lighthouse
programme.desc: A couple dreams of a lighthouse treehouse atop a seawall along the coast of Washington. Pete is challenged by the property's steep grade and must problem solve, delivering all of his materials, and even his crew, to the site via barge and boat only.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Tigers of Shark Bay
programme.desc: In this adventure, Steve learns how to trap an 11-foot tiger shark in a plastic bag.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Tiny Giants
programme.desc: Fluffy Keeshond puppies do their best to befriend a flock of ducks.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Fat Elvis
programme.desc: A photographer who works from home is at risk of losing his business because of a blood-thirsty cat. Then, a married couple and their son have a 21-lb cat who's become a problem.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Little Miracle
programme.desc: When a beloved black lab swallows toxic metal, Dr. Jeff races to save his life. A lost cat is found after a year and a half absence, but has a mysterious injury. And, a tiny dog has a big, life-threatening problem.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Award Winning Docs
programme.desc: The doctors are honored for their contributions to the community. Before the event, the clinic has animals in need of care, including a goat with a badly twisted leg, a Great Dane with a life-threatening condition and a bulldog rescued from a puppy mill.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Tortoise First Date
programme.desc: Love is in the air at Australia Zoo. Terri helps determine if Caballe the Rhino is pregnant, while Robert matchmakes with Coconut and Goliath, the Zoo's Aldabra giant tortoises.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Rare okapi Stomp must woo female K'Tusha, there's a struggle to be pack leader among the African painted dogs, and Raja the Bornean river turtle meets two new prospective mates.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Polar Bear in the City
programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age, so staff make sure he gets all the attention he needs. Also, a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their debut and a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Young Blood
programme.desc: A new inmate from starts working at VRC, hoping to fill the big shoes that Country Matt left behind. Lizzy and Joe struggle to catch a stray in a nearby neighborhood. A family comes to Villalobos to adopt a dog, hoping to fill a void in their hearts.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Girl Named Gun
programme.desc: After a couple from New Jersey falls in love with a new best friend, the adoption is put on the line when Dr. Kristen discovers a heart murmur. Tia heads out to the swamps to rescue a dog in need of medical attention and is shocked by the diagnosis.

programme.title: Movie: Soul Plane
programme.desc: Last-minute passenger additions shake things up on an airline's maiden flight.

programme.title: Movie: White Chicks
programme.desc: Two disgraced FBI agents go way undercover as white women in an effort to protect hotel heiresses, the Wilson Sisters, from a kidnapping plot.

programme.title: Movie: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: To impress his new girlfriend, Nick offers to drive her kids from Portland to Vancouver.

programme.title: Movie: The Best Man Holiday
programme.desc: Old rivalries and old flames are rekindled when a group of college friends reunite at Christmas, after 15 years.

programme.title: Martin: The Hoe Down in Motown
programme.desc: When the IRS busts Stan, he is forced to sell the radio station. When the new owner takes over, he turns it into a country and western station, and Martin tries to adapt.

programme.title: Martin: Martin's on the Move
programme.desc: Depressed, Martin leaves Detroit to find himself but doesn't tell Gina where he is going.

programme.title: Martin: In Search of ... Martin

programme.title: Snapped: Mary Ann Langley
programme.desc: When a marriage ends in flames, police must determine whether it was an accident or an act of revenge.

programme.title: Snapped: Mandy Smith

programme.title: Movie: The Mummy

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Boy Who Knew Too Much

programme.title: The Simpsons: Secrets of a Successful Marriage

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart of Darkness
programme.desc: While spying on the Flanders' with a telescope, Bart thinks he sees Ned murder his wife.

programme.title: Black-ish: Wilds of Valley Glen

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Like Us
programme.desc: Dre and Bow are furious after Diane isn't lit properly in her class photo. Diane doesn't want to make it a big deal, but they decide to talk to the principal about the need for sensitivity toward all complexions.

programme.title: Black-ish: Waltz in A Minor
programme.desc: Dre's teenage cousin Kyra needs a place to stay and the Johnsons decide to take her in, but they have different approaches to helping her adjust to suburban life. Meanwhile, Jack and Diane try to vet Kyra on social media to get information on her.

programme.title: Movie: Push
programme.desc: A young group of ex-patriate Americans try to hide from a U.S. Government agency that is out to capture them for experiments. They have psychic abilities and must use every skill they have not to be captured.

programme.title: Movie: The Mummy
programme.desc: While investigating a newly discovered Egyptian tomb, a team of explorers accidentally releases the evil mummified princess that was imprisoned within. Having only grown more malevolent and more evil over time, the mummy sets out to reshape the world.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Winter
programme.desc: The vast mountains, the surrounding oceans and the northerly latitude combine to deliver one of the most extreme winters on the planet.

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands
programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.title: Wild West: The High Country
programme.desc: America's High Country is the last of grizzly bears and giant trees, of frigid winters and scorching summers, of tough ranchers and gold-rush fever. From the Rockies to the Sierra Nevada, survival in this land of extreme seasons demands endurance.

programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores
programme.desc: Tectonic forces shape all life here, creating stunning landscapes like the San Andreas Fault, reaching north to the Pacific coast. Elephant seals battle it out for mates and grey whales form a unique friendship with a small community of people.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Yellowstone: Winter
programme.desc: In a land of beauty and peril, the dramatic lives and fortunes of its animals are inexorably bound together. Intimate and emotional, epic and engaging, 'Yellowstone' reveals the grandeur of this amazing place as its animals struggle to survive.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Yellowstone: Summer
programme.desc: As the snow melts, the extent of Yellowstone is revealed. Grizzly bears teach their young how to hunt fish and when to move out through valleys and grasslands into summer forests and up into the peaks. But summer here is fickle.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Spring
programme.desc: As spring lights up the land, Alaska faces the greatest transformation on earth. Temperatures soar, and as the sun hits the snow and ice, water, light and warmth return.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Summer
programme.desc: The few short weeks of an Alaskan summer must sustain the abundant wildlife for the whole year. No season brings more surprises. There is a predictable wealth of riches, but there is so little time to master the art of survival.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Winter
programme.desc: The vast mountains, the surrounding oceans and the northerly latitude combine to deliver one of the most extreme winters on the planet.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Yellowstone: Winter
programme.desc: In a land of beauty and peril, the dramatic lives and fortunes of its animals are inexorably bound together. Intimate and emotional, epic and engaging, 'Yellowstone' reveals the grandeur of this amazing place as its animals struggle to survive.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Yellowstone: Summer
programme.desc: As the snow melts, the extent of Yellowstone is revealed. Grizzly bears teach their young how to hunt fish and when to move out through valleys and grasslands into summer forests and up into the peaks. But summer here is fickle.

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands
programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.title: Wild West: The High Country
programme.desc: America's High Country is the last of grizzly bears and giant trees, of frigid winters and scorching summers, of tough ranchers and gold-rush fever. From the Rockies to the Sierra Nevada, survival in this land of extreme seasons demands endurance.

programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores
programme.desc: Tectonic forces shape all life here, creating stunning landscapes like the San Andreas Fault, reaching north to the Pacific coast. Elephant seals battle it out for mates and grey whales form a unique friendship with a small community of people.

programme.title: Life: Challenges of Life
programme.desc: Journey Earth to discover the extraordinary diversity of animals and plants that exists today and the most extreme stories of survival nature has to offer.

programme.title: Life: Reptiles and Amphibians
programme.desc: Reptiles and amphibians live on every continent except Antarctica. From icy wastelands to arid deserts, they outnumber mammals and birds, and their extraordinary forms and bizarre behaviour are constantly surprising.

programme.title: Life: Mammals
programme.desc: New techniques reveal previously unseen behaviour, both the huge spectacle and the remarkable intimacy of mammal life, in the most extreme locations on Earth.

programme.title: Life: Primates
programme.desc: By studying the world of primates in new and intimate detail, this episode offers fresh insight into the development of intelligence and social behaviour.

programme.title: Life: Hunters and Hunted
programme.desc: Explore the world of the carnivores, from cats and dogs to bears and dolphins that must make a kill in order to survive. To win, they must overcome the weapons, intelligence and speed of their prey.

programme.title: Life: Insects
programme.desc: Using the latest techniques and remote-controlled 'ant-cams', enter the world of armoured-plated insects, spiders and scorpions.

programme.title: Life: Birds

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Final Fishdown

programme.desc: Gloomy weather doesn't stop Pol's crew from taking on a range of unique cases, including testy bulls, coughing pigs and wobbly reindeer.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Goodnight Mooooooon
programme.desc: From unplanned pregnancies and long labors to mystery symptoms and power outages, the vets at Pol Veterinary Services have their hands full!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Mommy Reindeerest
programme.desc: Early springtime in Michigan means mothers, including Diane Pol, are being celebrated across the state.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Peacock-a-Doodle-Do
programme.desc: Spring is on the horizon in central Michigan and with it comes new life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Ice Cave
programme.desc: A strange cave freezes in the summer and melts in the winter, and a massive sand dune swallows a small child in an instant. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate these mysteries of the natural world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Texan Mass Extinction
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Atlantis in America
programme.desc: New theories claim that the legendary sunken city of Atlantis could have actually been in the Americas. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate evidence that might shed more light on one of the world's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Unearthed: American Heroes and Villains
programme.desc: Cutting-edge archaeological technology is revealing new secrets behind America's greatest heroes and most infamous villains, and fresh evidence uncovered at hi-tech investigations could change everything we know about these American icons.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Legend of James Bond
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the real-life inspiration behind famed espionage legend James Bond, and experts investigate how the fictional character influenced modern day intelligence agencies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Alcatraz's Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Alcatraz is home to secrets that only cutting-edge archaeology can reveal, and using the latest science and the newest tech, experts search for hidden evidence to investigate why so many tried and failed to escape America's toughest jail.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Legend of James Bond
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the real-life inspiration behind famed espionage legend James Bond, and experts investigate how the fictional character influenced modern day intelligence agencies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Wild West
programme.desc: The gunfight at Tombstone's OK Corral turned Wyatt Earp into an American folk hero, and to find what really happened here, experts use the newest tech to discover what caused the fatal shootout and what it reveals about the dark secrets of the Wild West.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Curse of the Catacombs
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth containing thousands of human skeletons is a dark mystery beneath the streets of Rome, and now, experts are using cutting-edge tech to reveal what killed them and why they were buried in this eerie place.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
Secrets of the Lost: Atlantis: The New Mystery
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that Atlantis is not just a myth, but a real civilization devastated by an apocalyptic volcanic eruption, and now, experts use the latest science to unearth discoveries that might confirm the location of this mysterious lost city.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: Monster Ships: World's Biggest Sail Ship
programme.desc: The world's biggest sailing ship is an engineering marvel that uses five masts and 42 giant sails to navigate the deadly waters of the Caribbean, and using cutting-edge tech, this innovative vessel can reach high speeds using wind alone.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Hell on Water
programme.desc: The Thermopylae is a massive vehicle carrier and one of the biggest ships ever built, and facing rough waves on deadly seas, her crew must navigate their priceless cargo to destinations on the other side of the world.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Titan of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: One of the largest ships of the Great Lakes is a mammoth freighter named the Algoma Sault, and she and her crew face deadly ice, killer fog, and treacherous canal crossings to safely transport 28,000 tons of coal in a race against the clock.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Mega Rig Overhaul
programme.desc: The Saipem 7000 is a gargantuan heavy-lift vessel equipped with two mega-cranes for world's toughest jobs, and now, she's faced with one of her hardest yet: upgrading a 30-year-old oil rig that sits in one of the most treacherous seas in the world.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Cruise Ship Colossus
programme.desc: The Crown Princess is a titanic cruise ship that weighs over 100,000 tons, and in a race against the clock, its crew must use the latest tech and cutting-edge engineering to prepare for their next voyage.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Sins of Ghost Vegas
programme.desc: An abandoned Vegas-style getaway with a deadly secret, a ghost town sinking into the earth, and a passenger train on a course for disaster are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Hell Tower, NYC
programme.desc: A New York City skyscraper that could topple at any moment, a city street that suddenly collapses, and a modern-day crisis at Pisa's Leaning Tower.

programme.desc: The team celebrates the opening of its new headquarters, finally complete after 10 years of working out of trailers. The new team, Arcady and Ted, get to know each other's styles in their first shifts together.

programme.title: Nightwatch: 100%, Every Time
programme.desc: Randy and Justin chase down a suspected car thief, while both EMT teams respond to emergency calls involving children in distress.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Dead Ringer/ My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: Neighbours always mix up sisters Sarah and Stevie, but their polar-opposite personalities is what set them apart in the end. Elena and Christina were both adopted, but these teenage sisters love, laugh, and battle like blood relatives.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Lose a Sister, Gain a Husband/ The Sinner and the Saint
programme.desc: When a friendly neighbor marries barely legal Linda, he rescues her from abject poverty, and invites her sister, Patti, into their twisted relationship.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Murder by Minivan/ Lose a Sister Gain a Baby
programme.desc: When Teresa's brother marries Betty Jo, the young bride becomes the sister Teresa was always dying for.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams: Casey Anthony
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams take a deeper look at the case and uncover new information relevant to the trial.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: He Seems Perfect
programme.desc: Budding New York fashion designer Jenae Aragosa falls hard for bartender Trevor Frederick. But as a dark side of her new man comes to light, Jenae comes to realize she'll be lucky if she makes it out of this relationship alive.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Behind the Barn
programme.desc: 20-year-old Kristy Ray is living at home and working her way through college until one day when she is shockingly abducted. Local law enforcement will need the help of the FBI and community members as they race to find Kristy before time runs out.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Come With Me
programme.desc: After a failed relationship, 22-year-old Jennifer Hitchcock thinks she may have finally found that special someone when she meets Maurice Mason. But as soon as Maurice moves in, she can't help but feel as though someone is watching her every move.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Way Out
programme.desc: An investigation into the missing persons case of 13-year-old Jessyca Mullenberg.

programme.title: See No Evil: Happy Birthday to Drew
programme.desc: On March 27, 2017, Andrew Nesbitt is found dead on his 46th birthday in his Madison, Wisconsin apartment. With no witnesses, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in local bars, cabs, and street corners to track down his killer.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: ABC's of Murder
programme.desc: When beloved Charlotte school-teacher Anthony Davis is discovered murdered in his home, detectives searching for his killer discover that despite Davis's best efforts to steer his students onto the right path, evil sometimes triumphs over good.

programme.title: Body Cam: Hunted
programme.desc: In Texas police set a trap for a would-be killer. Officers put a plan into action, and Body Cam reveals a deadly plot. In Florida, a high-speed chase leads police into a dangerous swamp. But when a K9 locates the suspect, the arrest turns into a rescue.

programme.title: Body Cam: 90 Minutes
programme.desc: Police pursue a father and son, plus, an officer's life changes when he comes face-to-face with an armed suspect.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: ABC's of Murder
programme.desc: When beloved Charlotte school-teacher Anthony Davis is discovered murdered in his home, detectives searching for his killer discover that despite Davis's best efforts to steer his students onto the right path, evil sometimes triumphs over good.

programme.title: Body Cam: Hunted
programme.desc: In Texas police set a trap for a would-be killer. Officers put a plan into action, and Body Cam reveals a deadly plot. In Florida, a high-speed chase leads police into a dangerous swamp. But when a K9 locates the suspect, the arrest turns into a rescue.

programme.title: Body Cam: 90 Minutes
programme.desc: Police pursue a father and son, plus, an officer's life changes when he comes face-to-face with an armed suspect.

programme.title: See No Evil: Happy Birthday to Drew
programme.desc: On March 27, 2017, Andrew Nesbitt is found dead on his 46th birthday in his Madison, Wisconsin apartment. With no witnesses, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in local bars, cabs, and street corners to track down his killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Watching Amy Lord
programme.desc: 24-year-old former cheerleader Amy Lord is missing in South Boston. Police first find her burned car and then... her body. Incredible footage from five ATMs and outside her apartment building captures the exact moment she was taken by her killer.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Lock Up Your Daughters
programme.desc: Gaffney, SC, 1968: When a local reporter receives a mysterious phone call from a murderer who threatens to kill again, Gaffney police must race against the clock to try to save the town's teen girls.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Mother's Little Helper
programme.desc: After the blood-soaked body of 76 year old Franklin Bradshaw is found behind the counter of his auto-parts store, detectives dig into the strained history of his family and uncover a hotbed of deceit, manipulation and all-consuming greed.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Bye Bye Betty
programme.desc: Odessa, TX, 1961: Teenager Betty Williams isn't home. She's not at school. Police are sure she is a runaway, until they uncover a shocking high school rumor that will change this small town forever.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Teenage Wasteland
programme.desc: Lincoln, NE, 1958: When two love-struck, sex-crazed teenagers embark on a killing spree in Lincoln, Nebraska, it will fall to one local sheriff to put the brakes on this nightmare of a joy ride.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Dungeon of Dread
programme.desc: When an off-duty police officer in San Francisco happens upon a minor theft at a lumberyard one Sunday afternoon, he unwittingly jumpstarts an investigation into one of California's deadliest, most depraved serial killers: Leonard Lake and Charles Ng.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Heat of the Night
programme.desc: In El Dorado County, CA, firefighters combatting a raging fire discover a burnt out SUV with the charred remains of a beloved local man reported missing just hours earlier, igniting an investigation into a sinister scheme, and exposing a deadly affair.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Married to Death
programme.desc: After a wild Christmas party, Ed Amos wakes to find his wife, Bobbe dead from an apparent cocaine overdose. When her toxicology report suggests foul play, detectives dig into their pasts to uncover greed, secret love affairs, and suspicious deaths.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: The Devil's Ranch
programme.desc: A college student goes missing on Spring Break, and authorities work around the clock to locate him. When a man runs a drug checkpoint, the investigation takes a grisly turn into a world of drug smuggling, the occult, and human sacrifice.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Frenzy
programme.desc: Billy Shuler is dead. Now, video and audio capture the detective’s desperate hunt for his killer. As the case slowly unravels, someone comes forward and identifies Billy's murderer. When the US Marshals get involved, the killer is brought to justice.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Albuquerque Ambush
programme.desc: Don Fluitt is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture the detectives hunt for his killer. As the case unravels, security video captures the moments just before the evil deed and a surprising twist will bring this killer to their knees.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: I Did It
programme.desc: Michelle Kinney is found murdered in her apartment in Dubuque, Iowa. Her neighbours are puzzled as she had no enemies. Local detectives unveil a haunting truth, leading to a shocking confession from an unlikely murderer.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.desc: Vietnam War sniper Carlos Hathcock takes on deadly covert missions, and Max Hardberger recovers illegally seized cargo ships out of dangerous third world ports.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Taking Flight
programme.desc: Rookie pilots George Welch and Kenneth Taylor battle the Japanese over Pearl Harbor, and ace fighter pilot Chuck Yeager becomes the first person to break the sound barrier.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: For a Greater Cause
programme.desc: George Rowe is a former criminal who goes undercover to bust a motorcycle gang, and the Masin brothers lead a resistance cell against Communist oppression in Czechoslovakia.

programme.desc: On this special edition, learn the real story behind the most famous flying devices in history and the truth behind our most influential inventors.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities

programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the Barnwood Builders take the logs from season 3's Bird's-Eye Barn across the New River and put them back together on a West Virginia island.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Cabin at a Crossroads
programme.desc: Mark finds a cabin from a unique moment in history when pioneers started using new technology: the sawmill. Later, Mark visits another West Virginia cabin filled with family memories.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: In Merrie's Memory
programme.desc: Joe and Merrie Colvard dreamed of having an antique log cabin. But only a few weeks after they picked one out on the Boneyard, tragedy struck and Merrie unexpectedly passed away. Joe is determined to build the cabin in his late wife's honour.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Pieces of the Past
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the guys salvage every last good log they can from an old double-pen barn in Pennsylvania so the logs can be reused to build a guesthouse in upstate New York.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Outlaw architect Michael Reynolds doesn't just live off the grid, he builds off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Straw Bale Cabin
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: White Mountain
programme.desc: With help from a team of friends, an avid outdoorsman takes on the challenge of building a cabin in the remote White Mountains region of Alaska. The crew must work through snow, wind and mud to haul materials and build the cabin in just seven days.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Containables: Hurricanes and Golf Balls
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen design and build a container home for a local couple's adopted son and fill it with fun features like a lofted bed, hydraulic TV winch and an outdoor fire pit. A second container has a custom workshop and a rooftop driving range.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging a House in Roanoke, VA, into Repurposed Housing Items
programme.desc: The entire Black Dog Salvage crew pitches in to help save parts of a house in Roanoke, VA. Main items include floors, trim, front porch columns, and a large built in cabinet. Back at the shop, Ted builds a fire pit and fountain from old syrup kettles.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Roanoke College
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage team saves architectural elements at Roanoke College in Salem, VA. Key items include railings, brick pavers, gothic lighting, and a safe from the 1940s.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Fringer Cannery
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the crew salvage an old iron ore mine that was converted into a cannery in the 1930s. Main items include a curved I-beam, oversized pressure-cookers, and a canning carousel.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From a Train Caboose into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: Hosts Mike and Robert salvage conductor chairs from a train caboose. The whole crew then picks through the Old Cold Storage warehouse in Arrington, VA. Back at the shop, Mike and Tay work together to build a large iron table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Greek Revival Farmhouse
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs preserve a Greek Rival farm house in Bentleyville, Pennsylvania. Main salvage items include mantles, tiles and a full-sized chicken coop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Covington Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs work on Covington Church and find tambour doors, stairs and a jukebox. Mike and Tay build a locker bench, then the crew finds a propane spotlight.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Clapp Farm Windmill
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the rest of the team salvage an Aeromotor windmill in Liberty, North Carolina. They also pick through various barns on the property. Back in the woodshop, Mike uses salvaged barn wood and iron to build a floor lamp.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Reed Creek Mill
programme.desc: The Dawgs salvage the Reed Creek Mill in Wytheville, VA. Key items found include conveyor belts and a flour hopper. Mike also builds a console for his nephew.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Terracotta Silo
programme.desc: The Dawgs struggle to take down a terracotta silo in Bedford, VA. While in town, Mike takes Tay and Grayson to visit the National D-Day Memorial. Back at the shop, Mike builds a coffee table from an old factory cart.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Old Robeson County Jail
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the Dawgs salvage a 1950s jail in Lumberton, NC. Key items include a holding cell, sinks, and slate countertops. At the shop, Mike and Tay build a bar from bowling alley flooring.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Commotion by the Ocean
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas are back in action looking for their next project, and Rob has his hands full with amazing properties. But, the house that speaks to Rob has big problems. Will the ninjas be able to see the potential?

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Hip-hop Hibachi
programme.desc: Rob designs a VIP hibachi grill for the hero house with fiber-optic lights that change colors with the push of a button.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: The Crown Jewel Pool
programme.desc: The existing pool looks more like a sewer than a swimming pool and it has got to go. Rob has grand plans to turn this frog into a prince. By changing its location and giving it a whole new shape, it'll become the crown jewel it was meant to be.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Fixin' the Kitchen
programme.desc: Rob has an idea to transform his dated kitchen space into a chef's retreat. Floor to ceiling sliders replace the far wall and provide a view to the ocean. The kitchen is given bran new appliances and a window backsplash.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Making an Entrance
programme.desc: The current entryway is dated and hated, so the ninjas open up the space and add modern glass features and a high-tech elevator.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: From Virtual to Reality
programme.desc: Technology and style go toe-to-toe when the ninjas tackle the spare rooms and game room. White walls disappear as an underwater mural takes shape and marine windows are installed.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Wrath of the Bath
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas give the master bath a clean and serene upgrade with luxurious finishes. New marble floors, an elegant vanity and an all-glass shower make this a relaxation station fit for royalty.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Master Suite Disaster
programme.desc: Rob overhauls the master bedroom and transforms it into an oasis with a view. Glass doors replace the entire wall and open up to a brand new balcony with its own spiral staircase. His final touch is a TV that drops from the ceiling.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smokin' Sides and Sweets
programme.desc: No cookout is complete without some outrageous side dishes and craveworthy desserts, so Roger Mooking is putting the main course aside to honor everything that tops off the best barbecue meals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Insane Inventions
programme.desc: Roger Mooking says goodbye to the standard grill and celebrates the most elaborate, over-the-top smokers and roasters.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pit Bosses
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is honoring the legendary pitmasters who make some of the country's best barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoked Out
programme.desc: Where there's fire, there's smoke, and some of the most flavourful meat on the market.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Sandwiches
programme.desc: Roger Mooking loves a great sandwich, and searches the country for the top 15 sandwiches.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Global Grub
programme.desc: Roger Mooking takes 15 gastronomical trips for the most exotic, flavourful and spicy foods all without leaving the U.S. The featured chefs create classic international meals from Ethiopia, Thailand, Mexico and more in their own American kitchens.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue in the Big Apple
programme.desc: Michael Symon is joined by his good buddy Michael Strahan at their favorite New York City burger spot. They bounce around The Big Apple dining on meatball sliders, succulent St. Louis style ribs and pastrami-topped pizza.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Tastes of the Tropics
programme.desc: Pastry chef phenom, Ron Ben-Israel, hangs with Michael Symon in Baton Rouge, La. to feast on a mile-high key lime pie and Caribbean-inspired brisket melt.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Houston, TX
programme.desc: Casey two-steps down to Houston, Texas, for some tex-mex tastiness, including a colossal 22-ounce chicken-fried steak and the ultimate spicy challenge: a burger topped with seven of the world's hottest chile peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Ostriches, Tacos and Groundhogs, Oh My!
programme.desc: A flightless bird of epic proportions comes to life in Dallas while taco fillings are piled high on a giant confectionary shell. Next, it's an extraordinary Sweet 16 when the birthday girl's face is reimagined on a cake.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Levitating, Robotic Cake

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Smarty Goof/ Adventures in Buddysitting!
programme.desc: Mickey and Goofy join the Hot Dog Hills' Invention Competition. Later, when the Hot Tog Hills play center closes, the Happy Helpers become babysitters for the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: Donald's Roadster Round-Up / The Daisy Dance!
programme.desc: On a trip to the convenience store, Donald and Pluto lose all the roadsters; The Happy Helpers take over Clarabelle's dance class.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Phantom of the Café / Cuckoo in Paris
programme.desc: During Chef Pierre's café opening, Goofy's famous Goofy Dogs are stolen! When the Happy Helpers return to Paris, Cuckoo Loca discovers new family members!

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Seat at the Theatre/ Bye Bye Butterfly
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a butterfly get home to its family in Mexico. The pugs push Bob's office chair to a theater to see his favorite play.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Legend of Ol' Snapper/Adventures in Puppy-Sitting
programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: A Very Sticky Problem/ Forward Marsh
programme.desc: Mazu sees life through a raptor’s eyes when she gets stuck to Cror by some tar. Rocky hopes to get the best viewing spot to watch the "winter lights" dance across the night sky.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Invisi-Bill/ Patchy Sees the Light
programme.desc: Bill’s friends pretend he is invisible so he can win at hide-and-seek.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Wild Tire/ Sittin' Kitty
programme.desc: Mickey tries to surprise racing champion Jiminy Johnson with a tire from his first roadster. Minnie and Daisy wind up on a search throughout Hot Dog Hills when the cat they are pet-sitting escapes.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: It's Wiki Wiki Time/ Happy Hula Helpers!
programme.desc: Donald's Hawaiian vacation is interrupted when the rest of the gang arrives for a big relay race. The Happy Helpers are tasked with teaching a hula dance for a birthday celebration.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Chin Up, Pups / The Wind Beneath My Paws
programme.desc: The Pugs make a hospitalized child's wish come true; The Pugs search for Bob's Gift.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Romeo's Melody/PJ Robot Takes Control
programme.desc: The PJ Masks must wear ear-protecting helmets when Romeo writes a song that turns listeners into his servant. PJ Robot tries to turn Romeo's Flying Factory into a Flying Party!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Owlette and the Owlteenies / Gekko's Blame Campaign
programme.desc: When Night Ninja pushes the Ninjalinos too far, they become Owlette’s new sidekicks. When Greg doesn’t take care of Cameron's mini-car, it goes missing.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: International superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music, laughter and stories.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers. Join Ralph, Leo, Donnie and Mikey as they master new weapons, battle absurd mutants and discover a hidden city beneath New York.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy and his fairy godparents have magical adventures.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Masked Magician/ The Big Bash
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for Magician powers to perform at the fair; Cupid has a party at his house.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Micecapades/ Formula for Disaster
programme.desc: Poof turns Timmy and Vicki into cartoon cat and mouse characters and mayhem follows.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Arr in the Family
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne is determined to help CJ get onstage at a pirate dinner show.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Show With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne secretly starts watching her family's favourite telenovela after refusing to watch it with them.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Oh Brother Where Art Thou/ The Wall
programme.desc: Alvin thinks he's losing his mind when Simon goes missing and no one else even remembers who Simon is. When the girls at school cast votes for the cutest chipmunk on the bathroom wall, Alvin worries about the results.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dog Days/ Dragon Dad
programme.desc: The Chipmunks take in a stray dog, but have to keep the puppy hidden from Dave, who won't allow pets. Theodore orders a dragon egg in the hopes of it hatching into a real dragon.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Shiny Teeth/ Odd Odd West
programme.desc: An evil dentist steals Chip Skylark's teeth before a show; Timmy travels to the Old West.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Oddpirates
programme.desc: The Pirates opening game is today, and everyone except Timmy is going, instead he is on a real Pirate ship.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Clark Laser/ Married to the Mom
programme.desc: When Timmy and Chloe save Dark Laser's beloved pet, Flipsie, Dark Laser becomes bound to them as their bodyguard. Timmy and Chloe wish up a girlfriend for Mr. Crocker to get him off their backs.

programme.title: The Loud House: Face the Music With the Casagrandes/ Pranks for the Memories With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne discovers that each family member will perform at Hector's birthday, she turns to Sid for help. Ronnie Anne's attempts to bond with her cool older cousin Carlota lead to a prank war against the boy cousins.

programme.title: The Loud House: Store Wars With the Casagrandes/ Lucha Fever With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When a fancy grocery store opens on the block, Bobby rallies the family to do everything they can to compete. Ronnie Anne fakes being sick to watch a Lucha Libre match, which proves to be more difficult than anticipated.

programme.desc: Doug goes against Carrie's advice and buys himself a new car.
