programme.desc: While the IPS strike continues, Carrie and Kelly worry about their husbands' sanity.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Dark Meet
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie recall Thanksgiving Day 1993, when Doug first met Carrie's family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Very Cavallari: Pass the Popcorn
programme.desc: Kristin takes an emotional trip down memory lane as she wraps up her visit in Laguna. The mean girl culture at Uncommon James comes to a head when Kristin lays down the law at the office, leaving Colby feeling like a target. The team have a block party.

programme.title: Very Cavallari: The One Where Jay Goes Cray
programme.desc: Kristin takes off her boss hat when her friends come to Nashville for sleepovers and dinner parties, but everyone is left a little confused when Jay loses his cool. Brittainy tries to bury the hatchet with Matt, but their conversation takes a turn.

programme.title: Very Cavallari: Best Frenemies Forever
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the awkward friend dinner, Kristin and Jay realize they need to make more time for each other as a couple. Brittainy's friendship with Kristin creates a rift between her and the other employees, ending in a confrontation.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Bold Tastes and Big Laughs
programme.desc: It's a night of memorable characters and mouthwatering food in the market. Chefs have to spellcheck the ingredients for breakfast when Guy plays ABC. Next, competitors keep their eye on the ounces when they're forced to weigh their steakhouse dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Frozen Feats
programme.desc: Chefs must create an Asian stir fry using no more than five ingredients. In the second game, they are given an unusual grocery list with the items that must be used for their fun family meal.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: No-Shop Showdown
programme.desc: For the first time in GGG history, none of the competing chefs get to shop for their ingredients. Instead, Guy Fieri gives them each a cart full of groceries that has to last all three rounds, and he decides what they make in each round.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Patiently Weighting
programme.desc: Four chefs must make comfort food using no more than five pounds of ingredients. Next, the chefs must use Guy's unusual grocery list for their noodle dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Budget War
programme.desc: Penny pinching is the name of the game as Guy Fieri challenges four chefs to budget wisely with $40 and two grueling rounds of shopping and cooking.

programme.desc: Guy Fieri doesn't let up on the final three pairs of Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives and Guy's Grocery Games Super Teams. He spins his DDD Dish Wheel and GGG Game Wheel to nail down all the variables for the competition.

programme.title: American Dad!: Stan-Dan Deliver

programme.desc: Tina allows Tammy to spend Spring Break with the Belchers and even plays Cupid, setting up Tammy with Brett, a boy from out of town. Then, Gene and Bob enlist the help of Dr. Yap in finding a replacement baby tooth to complete Linda's collection.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Hurt Soccer

programme.title: Movie: Dawn of the Planet of the Apes

programme.title: Movie: War for the Planet of the Apes

programme.title: Life: Plants
programme.desc: Enter the world of plants as time-lapse technology makes this violent and self-seeking organism's behaviour a truly dynamic and surprisingly emotional experience.

programme.title: Life: Fish
programme.desc: Witness the secret and ferocious world of the great white and sailfish, the puffer fish and barracuda, in this extraordinary journey from open ocean to coral reef and from storm-ravaged surf zone to the abyssal depths.

programme.title: Life: Mammals
programme.desc: New techniques reveal previously unseen behaviour, both the huge spectacle and the remarkable intimacy of mammal life, in the most extreme locations on Earth.

programme.title: Life: Reptiles and Amphibians
programme.desc: Reptiles and amphibians live on every continent except Antarctica. From icy wastelands to arid deserts, they outnumber mammals and birds, and their extraordinary forms and bizarre behaviour are constantly surprising.

programme.title: Life: Challenges of Life
programme.desc: Journey Earth to discover the extraordinary diversity of animals and plants that exists today and the most extreme stories of survival nature has to offer.

programme.title: Life: Primates
programme.desc: By studying the world of primates in new and intimate detail, this episode offers fresh insight into the development of intelligence and social behaviour.

programme.title: Life: Hunters and Hunted
programme.desc: Explore the world of the carnivores, from cats and dogs to bears and dolphins that must make a kill in order to survive. To win, they must overcome the weapons, intelligence and speed of their prey.

programme.title: Life: Insects
programme.desc: Using the latest techniques and remote-controlled 'ant-cams', enter the world of armoured-plated insects, spiders and scorpions.

programme.title: Life: Birds
programme.desc: Using specially developed aerial and underwater camera techniques to enter the world of birds, explore their incredible diversity and behaviour, and see these beautiful creatures in a whole new way.

programme.title: Life: Creatures of the Deep
programme.desc: A journey into the uncharted corners of the ocean where the newest discoveries are being made and where the strangest sea creatures can be found.

programme.title: Life: Plants
programme.desc: Enter the world of plants as time-lapse technology makes this violent and self-seeking organism's behaviour a truly dynamic and surprisingly emotional experience.

programme.title: Life: Fish
programme.desc: Witness the secret and ferocious world of the great white and sailfish, the puffer fish and barracuda, in this extraordinary journey from open ocean to coral reef and from storm-ravaged surf zone to the abyssal depths.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Melt
programme.desc: The summer melt of Arctic ice provides opportunities for millions of animals, including narwhal, beluga whales, families of Arctic foxes and vast colonies of seabirds. But for polar bears, it's the toughest time of year.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Salmon Run
programme.desc: A spectacular natural event takes place in North America every year as hundreds of millions of salmon return from the Pacific Ocean to the mountain streams where they were born. The salmon must overcome fierce torrents and leap over waterfalls.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Migration
programme.desc: Each year, over a million wildebeest and zebra invade the Serengeti grasslands making it a paradise for the predators that live there. We follow the moving story of one lion family's struggle to survive.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Tide
programme.desc: The Sardine Run is the world's largest gathering of predators; each winter a mighty army of ocean predators hunt the sardines gathering along South Africa's eastern coast; with the Run becoming less stable it has effects that run right up the food chain.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Flood
programme.desc: The yearly flood of the Okavango Delta turns 4,000 square miles of arid plains into wetland.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Feast
programme.desc: Every summer in the seas off Alaska, humpback whales, sea lions and killer whales depend on an explosion of plant life: the plankton bloom. It transforms these seas into the richest on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pup-Pup-Hooray!
programme.desc: From constipated canines to nasty dogfights, these pups have seen better days.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: E-I-E-I-Pol
programme.desc: Spring showers bring May flowers and a rather painful situation for one unlucky patient.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Flip 'N Stitch
programme.desc: The first days of autumn bring a new vet to Pol Veterinary Services.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Alpacalypse
programme.desc: Dr. Pol hits the road to House Farms to handle an emergency calving, where a bone has cracked and fallen into the pelvis of the cow, blocking the calf’s way out.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Crash of the Titan
programme.desc: As one of the largest construction cranes in the world lifts a one-million-ton section of roof for Milwaukee's Miller Park stadium, it suddenly collapses. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Curse of the Devil's Dam
programme.desc: When a dam breaks during routine maintenance, engineers fear a catastrophic flood. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how a simple miscalculation could be to blame.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Boston's Big Dig Disaster
programme.desc: Boston's Big Dig was one of the most ambitious engineering projects in history, but in 2006, a fatal collapse in one of its tunnels put the ambitious project in doubt; experts reveal what caused this engineering disaster and how it was fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Olympic Stadium Fiasco
programme.desc: Montreal's Olympic Stadium was an ambitious engineering project with a striking Space Age design, but it's distinctive roof had caused over one billion dollars in cost overruns. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science can fix it.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: US Army's Super Tank
programme.desc: The US Army's Abrams tank is a 70-ton war machine capable of reaching speeds of 45 miles per hour on the most extreme terrains on earth, but before it enters the battlefield, it must face a set of brutal challenges to put its engineering to the test.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: F-35 Fighter Jet
programme.desc: The F-35 is the most advanced fighter jet on the planet, and special access into the most expensive military program ever reveals how engineers use cutting-edge technology to outfit this 1,200 mile-per-hour aircraft with a state-of-the-art stealth system.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fireworks Declassified
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes at one of the world's largest fireworks companies, and reveal the explosive secrets and cutting-edge innovations of its world-class pyrotechnics experts.

programme.title: MythBusters: Accidental Ammo
programme.desc: Stand by for some ballistic backyard bedlam and a gruesome glass guillotine in an episode devoted to accidental ammo.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: F-35 Fighter Jet
programme.desc: The F-35 is the most advanced fighter jet on the planet, and special access into the most expensive military program ever reveals how engineers use cutting-edge technology to outfit this 1,200 mile-per-hour aircraft with a state-of-the-art stealth system.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fireworks Declassified

programme.title: MythBusters: Accidental Ammo

programme.desc: The US Army's Abrams tank is a 70-ton war machine capable of reaching speeds of 45 miles per hour on the most extreme terrains on earth, but before it enters the battlefield, it must face a set of brutal challenges to put its engineering to the test.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Top Secret Terror
programme.desc: Was the Moon landing faked? Images of Mercury reveal massive spider-like formations on its surface. Is it an odd geological formation, or something much more ominous? A classified space shuttle mission ends in near-disaster. What was its secret mission?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Pluto Under Pressure
programme.desc: Lost tapes reveal that Apollo astronauts heard unexplained transmissions on the far side of the moon, an amateur astronomer spots a strange disturbance in Martian atmosphere and an unidentified object in Earth orbit starts stalking Russian spacecraft.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Alien Death Ray
programme.desc: The Viking Lander may have found life on Mars, but we don't know anything about it.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did Earth Have Two Moons?
programme.desc: A starling discovery suggests that the hellish clouds of Venus may be the origin of life on Earth. A bizarre sighting 2,000 years ago raises the possibility that the Earth once had two moons. A NASA scientist helps the FBI crack the 1996 Olympic bombing.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Rise of the Ice Creatures
programme.desc: Neil Armstrong goes into an unexplained spin. He needs to figure out what's causing it, or he faces certain death. An Apollo 17 photo seems to show a U.S. military outpost on the moon. Could there be alien life swimming in the oceans of Jupiter's moons?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Rise of the Planet Killer
programme.desc: A mission to Mars captures an image of a strange structure on the Red Planet. Files from the first Apollo mission record an eerie sighting on the dark side of the moon. A planet-eating star gives scientists a glimpse of Earth's terrible demise.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Aliens in the Amazon
programme.desc: After Neil Armstrong's moonwalk, he led an expedition into the Amazon to find a legendary library that holds all knowledge of an advanced alien civilization. Experts ask if a close encounter on the moon's surface inspired Armstrong's mysterious quest.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Casey Anthony
programme.desc: World famous prosecutor, Marcia Clark, investigates the bone chilling, unresolved death of toddler Caylee Anthony to see if the beautiful little girl was murdered by her own mother.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Lester Street
programme.desc: Toney and his team respond to Memphis's worst mass murder in more than 15 years.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: The Good Mother
programme.desc: Nellie Litvinova disappeared a few hours after her daughter brought her home from a doctor's appointment.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Blood Lust

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: The Good Student/ Left in Danger/ Lady on a Bridge
programme.desc: Detectives search for a missing student, hunt down an alleged gang member, and save a woman threatening suicide on a bridge.

programme.desc: Marcia Clark examines the mysterious death of Chandra Levy, the Washington DC intern who had an alleged affair with United States Congressman, Gary Condit. With no one held accountable for Chandra's brutal murder, Marcia investigates what really happened.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Guardians of the City
programme.desc: Titus and Dan treat a woman who was viciously stabbed in the face, and Holly and Nick tend to an emotional young transgendered woman who was assaulted. A wild police chase ends with a major car accident.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: With a large shipment of heroin about to arrive in Laredo, the LPD team conducts a citywide crackdown of suspected heroin dealers to learn where and when the drugs will arrive.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The Candyman
programme.desc: A series of controlled buys leads detectives to the house of a local dealer.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: A woman drives with 60 pounds of dope in her car trunk while her daughter sleeps in the backseat.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Show Me the Money
programme.desc: Roly goes undercover to nab a top cocaine and heroin dealer, whose most recent crime involved shooting an officer.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Cartel City
programme.desc: The team's K-9 sniffs out a package with black tar heroin hidden inside a child's teddy bear.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The Ledger
programme.desc: LPD Narcotics busts a stash house holding cocaine and guns, plus a ledger filled with information that could help end a heavy cocaine operation.

programme.title: Crime 360: At Death's Door
programme.desc: It's a race against time to identify a murder suspect before he disappears for good.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Be Right Back
programme.desc: When Alicia DeBolt goes missing, a helpful neighbor points the finger at an older kid she's been hanging out with. When police discover a string of texts on her cell phone, the net closes in on a sadistic killer whose obsession leads to tragedy.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: Firefighter Sam Dreher and his wife Danielle are the perfect couple. But after their hopes of happiness are dashed, their marriage fails. When Sam falls in love with another woman, his affair triggers a chain of events that spirals out of control.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Death of an Internet Star
programme.desc: When a young fashion designer and mother of three becomes a YouTube star with her online sewing tutorials, the money starts rolling in. But her obsessive and violent ex-boyfriend isn't prepared to let her rise to the top without him in her life.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Webcam of Lies
programme.desc: When a hopeful 12-year-old singer looks for fame online using her webcam, she gathers many admirers, and soon finds a boy who flatters her so much she falls for him. But her dreams become her worst nightmare when a shocking photo is shared online.

programme.title: Killer Bods: Fit for Murder
programme.desc: Obsessed with his mistress, a hard-bodied security specialist plots to murder his wife. But his scheme, masterminded by the unlikeliest of conspirators, takes a sudden and deadly twist.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Animal Nature
programme.desc: When a young woman is found mysteriously slaughtered on the steps of a trailer, Kenda and the homicide team must track down the vile perpetrators responsible for a horrifying string of cold-blooded murders.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: American Nightmare
programme.desc: John follows the trail of fugitive Leroy Headley whose 911 call sends police down a dark and twisting path that unravels a history of violence. Cal uncovers hidden truths behind the case of Jeffrey Forrest, a dangerous sexual predator on the run.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it's up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice. Then Police break up a domestic dispute and find a body in the bedroom.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Animal Nature
programme.desc: When a young woman is found mysteriously slaughtered on the steps of a trailer, Kenda and the homicide team must track down the vile perpetrators responsible for a horrifying string of cold-blooded murders.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: American Nightmare
programme.desc: John follows the trail of fugitive Leroy Headley whose 911 call sends police down a dark and twisting path that unravels a history of violence. Cal uncovers hidden truths behind the case of Jeffrey Forrest, a dangerous sexual predator on the run.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it's up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice. Then Police break up a domestic dispute and find a body in the bedroom.

programme.title: Killer Bods: Fit for Murder
programme.desc: Obsessed with his mistress, a hard-bodied security specialist plots to murder his wife. But his scheme, masterminded by the unlikeliest of conspirators, takes a sudden and deadly twist.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Blood Money
programme.desc: The cold-blooded execution of an affable middle-aged couple sends shockwaves of fear through their normally quiet community. Clues are scarce, until Demery and Mayfield uncover a cache of threatening text messages from a pair of mysterious numbers.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Loose Cannon
programme.desc: A mother of three is shot point-blank with a high-caliber rifle just steps from her front door. To catch a two-faced killer with a history of violence, Demery must first win the trust of a family wary of the system.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: New Year's Nightmare
programme.desc: New Year's Eve 2009, Mikarah Sanders is shot in a home invasion. Police search for the intruder by diving into her digital world, where they learn the killer has been under their noses all along, driven by rage to commit a shocking crime of passion.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Deadly Connections
programme.desc: January 2013, high school freshman Shaniesha Forbes' body is found on a Brooklyn beach. NYPD Detectives begin piecing together her final moments and discover her social media life including a list of 1,600 Facebook friends and potential suspects.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: A Secret Life
programme.desc: When 18-year old Brittany Clardy starts dating an older man, her life veers from model student to lost soul. And when the teenager disappears, her family panics. Now, investigators must unravel her complicated life filled with secrets and regret.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed Kay Wenal?
programme.desc: Erin Moriarty takes viewers deep inside the investigation into a hard-to-close murder case and those investigators are asking the audience to help solve the murder of Kay Wenal.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Strange Case of Kurt Sonnenfeld
programme.desc: Kurt Sonnenfeld claims his wife Nancy put a gun to her head and killed herself, but Denver police believe otherwise. However, they may never get a chance to prove it as he's moved with a new wife to Argentina, which has yet to extradite him to the US.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Trail of Tears
programme.desc: A couple's mountain hike turns into a tragedy and the woman's boyfriend is charged with her murder.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: Bill and Mary Yoder are a happy couple, running a medical practice outside of Utica, New York. But their world collapses when Mary becomes mysteriously sick, and detectives prove that her illness was no accident.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Wolf and the Sheep
programme.desc: Kevin and Tabatha Bryant are a picture-perfect couple, living with their two young sons in Penfield, New York. But when Tabatha is found stabbed to death at home, a steamy affair and many double lives are revealed to the town's unsuspecting residents.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Killer Collection
programme.desc: Gary and Jan Tyrrell are a beloved couple living in a quaint suburb of Springfield, Missouri. The tight-knit community is soon rocked by their double homicide, with friends and neighbours looking at those closest to the pair as their potential killer.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Thanksgiving Ambush
programme.desc: Rob and Brenda Andrew are a devout couple, living in the Bible Belt of Oklahoma City. But their world is shattered when both of them are shot during a violent home invasion. The mastermind will prove to be closer than anyone ever imagined.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Helicopters
programme.desc: A superior aerial force changes the stakes of any battle. Take a look at some of the fastest, deadliest attack helicopters soaring over combat zones today.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Guns
programme.desc: The guns used in modern warfare are a terrifying fusion of unparalleled accuracy, range and stopping power. Take an inside look at the most ubiquitous and fundamental assets on the battlefield.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Explosives
programme.desc: Explosives are the terrifying sound and fury of modern warfare, annihilating any military target that threatens an army's personnel or stands in their way.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Fighters
programme.desc: America's fighter planes are renowned as the world's deadliest and most dominant aerial assassins. Explore the top fighters ever, and look at what the future holds.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Fighters
programme.desc: America's fighter planes are renowned as the world's deadliest and most dominant aerial assassins. Explore the top fighters ever, and look at what the future holds.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Explosives
programme.desc: Explosives are the terrifying sound and fury of modern warfare, annihilating any military target that threatens an army's personnel or stands in their way.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War II
programme.desc: By the end of the 70's, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive the Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War
programme.desc: A look at the crucial events of the 1960s: U.S. troops in Vietnam, the USSR's warheads in Cuba and the moon landing.

programme.desc: A great house is not complete without the ultimate garage. This project includes a TV and lounge seating for a multifunctional space that shines. New pavers and a dazzling front gate make this one garage that's hard to drive by.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Sealing The Deal
programme.desc: Every inch of this house has been fully updated, customized and improved. It's a beautiful space perfect for entertaining, relaxing, or just having fun. This home keeps it real and at the end of the day, that's what seals the deal.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: New Home for Single Mom
programme.desc: Mike travels to Denver to help single mom Terrie find the right house for her and her daughters. Mike shows her how to identify any problems or imperfections that could turn the house from a dream home into a nightmare of repairs.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Trio Hunts for Home in Aurora
programme.desc: In Aurora, Colorado, Mike lends a hand to newlyweds Ambera and Clayton.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Eyeing First Home in Englewood
programme.desc: Newlyweds Andie and Pete are ready to buy their first home in Englewood, Colorado. Mike steps in and tours their chosen homes and shows the couple what's worth a good bid and what's worth walking away from.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home

programme.title: Containables: A Great Room With Great Views

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Buyers Bootcamp With Scott McGillivray: Ranch Style Rehab vs. Cape Cod Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Scott puts his real estate skills to the test when presented with two homes in an unfamiliar market. He quickly discovers that flipping in a new city can have some unexpected financial repercussions.

programme.title: Buyers Bootcamp With Scott McGillivray: Colonial Competition
programme.desc: Scott faces a tough decision when he has to choose between two classic Colonial-style houses. Some renovation surprises are to be expected, but when he discovers a 'phantom' third floor, it takes the rehab to a whole new level.

programme.title: Buyers Bootcamp With Scott McGillivray: Swimming Pool Showdown
programme.desc: Scott takes his investment dollars to sunny south Florida where he's pitched two appealing properties. Both have great value-adding potential, but when he finds himself drowning in structural issues, Scott questions whether he will sink or swim.

programme.title: Buyers Bootcamp With Scott McGillivray: Battle of the Beachside Bungalows
programme.desc: Scott McGillivray debates partnering with an eager couple new to flipping and another couple stuck in a mid-flip crisis. With two great houses full of value adding possibilities at his fingertips, Scott is confident that he can't make a wrong choice.

programme.title: Buyers Bootcamp With Scott McGillivray: Dated Design vs. Irregular Layout
programme.desc: Scott thinks he has a pretty easy decision to make after touring a dated house in need of an overhaul and a large home with a bizarre layout. When an unexpected change in financing comes into play, Scott changes his mind on which house to purchase.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Meat-Fest
programme.desc: Food Network stars including Duff, Michael Symon, Ted Allen and Cat Cora bring on the meat! Leg of beast, roast suckling pig, lamb shank, even a tri-tip sandwich, it's meat that can't be beat.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Snack Attack
programme.desc: From pickles to tacos, nachos to nuts, we reveal the snackalicious snacks craved by Giada, Ted Allen, Alex Guarnaschelli, Curtis Stone and more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate
programme.desc: Food chefs Alton, Duff, Tyler and Claire discuss chocolate recipes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Crunchy
programme.desc: Duff, Claire and Brian discuss some of their favourite crispy foods to eat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Phenomenal Philly Food Feast
programme.desc: Nick Lachey hooks up with Michael Symon in Philadelphia, one of the best beer cities in the country with a food scene to match. From Chef Jose Garces' over-the-top bourbon burger, to true German smoked sausages.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Giant Meat and Habanero Heat
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with a burger that originated as a late night, off-menu secret and accidentally became the talk of the town. Then, in Seattle, a beer hall serves a mammoth, pretzel-breaded, deep-fried pork shank.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Supremely Smokey and Dizzyingly Delicious
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Savannah, where fried chicken and pancake tacos are a delicious reinvention of classic chicken and waffles. In Seattle, a burger with a house-made chorizo patty brings serious Spanish flavor to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ in Big Cities
programme.desc: Roger knows it's not just small towns that dish out big flavours. He heads to Bludso's Bar and Que in L.A., where the owner brings meat and hear to Tinseltown in a big way.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Roadside 'Cue
programme.desc: While road-tripping through Texas, Roger Mooking pulls the car over for some seriously delicious barbecue. In San Antonio, he makes a pit stop at The Box Street Social food truck to hang chickens and racks of ribs over a live fire.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Comfort
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best comfort foods served in restaurants across America. He's in the kitchen revealing comfort-loving chefs' soul-warming secrets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Door County
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern scopes out the down-to-earth culinary traditions of scenic Door County, Wisconsin. Fresh fish from Lake Michigan and local produce defines the Nordic-influenced cuisine of this vacation getaway for nature lovers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic soul food of the Mississippi Delta. From fried catfish and hushpuppies to smothered oxtails and decadent mud pie, the Deep South's down-home dishes soothe the soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Deep Fried
programme.desc: From crispy-fried pork schnitzel and the spiciest chicken on the planet to crunchy pork cracklings and Roman artichokes, Andrew Zimmern travels the globe to find the guiltiest deep-fried pleasures.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hyderabad
programme.desc: Andrew explores the aromatic treasures of Hyderabad, India. From savory potato pastries and silver-garnished syrupy fried bread to spicy pancakes and hearty meals of meat and rice, Hyderabad's menus are fit for royalty.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Cheesy, Fresh And Fried
programme.desc: Food truck aficionado Chef Brad Miller starts off in Durham, N.C., with a visit to American Meltdown, a food truck where Chef Paul Inserra is surprising customers with his innovative and mouthwatering spins on the classic grilled cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Tacos, Drumsticks and Stuffed Waffles
programme.desc: Brad Miller starts off in Nashville, where chef Danny Bua is packing unique flavour combinations into soft tortilla tacos on That Awesome Taco Truck. Brad tries the '80s throwback taco with a cheese quesadilla base as well as a lobster roll taco.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Corn Dogs, Cheesesteaks and Ice Cream Sandwiches
programme.desc: Brad Miller heads to Seattle, where Rob Killiam of Bread and Circuses is dishing out comfort food with a playful twist.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoke and Steam
programme.desc: Roger is invited to two community gatherings abundant with local foods on the Hawaiian Island of Oahu.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: South Carolina Surf and Turf
programme.desc: Roger leaves the city of Charleston and heads out into the country for some whole hog barbecue and low-country oyster roasts.

programme.title: Good Eats: Withering Bites
programme.desc: Dried fruit may not be glamorous, but what it lacks in fashion, it more than makes up for in flavor and versatility. Before your good fruit goes bad, take a tip from host Alton Brown and dry it.

programme.title: Good Eats: Kinda Blue (Blueberry)
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals the secrets to turning the blueberry into a year-round treat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Campfire Creations
programme.desc: Noah follows smoke signals to the fairground. He chows down on midway food inspired by cooking over an open campfire.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Living Mummies of Toth-Ra
programme.desc: In a lost pyramid, Louie interprets a pharaoh's prophecy to his advantage, forcing Scrooge and Launchpad to convince a group of living mummies to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper and Mabel vs. the Future
programme.desc: Mabel decides to plan for her and Dipper's 13th birthday party. Meanwhile, Dipper ventures below the town to find its most shocking secret.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Last Mabelcorn
programme.desc: A new threat leads Mabel to venture into the enchanted realm of the unicorns. Meanwhile, Dipper learns an unexpected twist about the enigmatic Bill Cipher.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Steamer's Revenge

programme.title: DuckTales: The Infernal Internship of Mark Beaks
programme.desc: Huey competes with Dewey for a coveted internship with Duckburg's newest tech billionaire Mark Beaks, while Scrooge and Glomgold team up to take this annoying new competitor down.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: DuckTales: Day of the Only Child!
programme.desc: Dewey creates a holiday so that triplets can be only children for just one day. Quickly, the brothers learn that they need each other more than they realized.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Karmi and Hiro team up to help treat someone with genetically engineered parasites.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Big Deal/ Forbidden Feline

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Song Remains Asleep/ Baby Got Hunchback
programme.desc: Aunt Lydia wants to replace the hotel's elevator music. Mavis and the gang uncover Quasimodo's secret recipe for dirt flambé.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Enter the Nosepicker/ Hide and Shriek
programme.desc: Mavis accidentally lures a Nose Picker into the hotel. Later, Mavis finds her childhood toy, Demented Debbie, in the attic.

programme.desc: After Aunt Cass nearly figures out Hiro’s secret life as a member of Big Hero 6, Hiro plays matchmaker to find Aunt Cass a boyfriend to distract her.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muira-Horror!
programme.desc: Hiro and Go Go accompany Krei to the woods to deal with Nedd Ludd, however they run into the monster of legend, the Hibagon, along the way.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape To/ From Atlantis
programme.desc: Dewey's attempts to impress Scrooge on a trip to the Lost City of Atlantis leads to trouble. Donald tries to protect the boys from his new employer who is trying to destroy them.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Hiro gets set up with 14-year-old Megan, leading him to wonder if he's missing out on a normal life. The team must deal with an upgraded High Voltage.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Soup Nazi

programme.desc: George's mother throws her back out when she catches sight of George. Jerry challenges George, Kramer and Elaine to a contest of self-denial.

programme.title: Conan
programme.desc: Today's guest is Ilana Glazer.

programme.title: Miracle Workers: 1 Day
programme.desc: God meets with potential investors for his ground-breaking new restaurant.

programme.title: Miracle Workers: 1 Hour
programme.desc: Craig risks it all in a desperate attempt to save Earth and all of mankind.

programme.title: Conan
programme.desc: Today's guest is Ilana Glazer.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Engagement
programme.desc: After talking to Jerry, George decides to get back with Susan and ends up asking her to marry him. When Elaine's sleep is disturbed by a barking dog, Kramer asks Newman to get rid of it.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Postponement
programme.desc: George is overwhelmed and desperately tries to find a way to postpone his wedding.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Big House Pt. 1
programme.desc: Jake and Rosa assimilate to their new lives behind bars, but both are coping in very different ways. Jake bonds with his cellmate, Caleb, and is forced to join a prison gang led by notorious inmate Romero, in order to gain his protection.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Big House Pt. 2
programme.desc: When the warden asks Jake to investigate Romero's drug smuggling operation, Jake and Caleb find themselves caught between the loyalty Jake has sworn to both of them.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Kicks
programme.desc: Now that he's officially back at the precinct and desperate to solve a real case, Jake finds a loophole to get out of his temporarily designated desk duty.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: HalloVeen
programme.desc: The Nine-Nine embarks on its fifth annual Halloween Heist and, as usual, everybody has a plan and no one is safe. Relationships and friendships are tested as the title 'Amazing Human Slash Genius' must be snagged by midnight.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Life After Death
programme.desc: Caroline attends her former nanny's funeral, thinking the family will be honoured to have her, but she quickly finds out they have no idea who she is.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the French Kiss
programme.desc: After an incredible make-out session with Max's pastry school teacher, Chef Nicholas, Caroline finds out something that makes her wish it never happened.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Big But
programme.desc: Max finds herself wanting to be more than just friends with her pastry school partner, Deke. Meanwhile, Caroline is 'hot for teacher' -- the married Chef Nicholas.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Garage Sale
programme.desc: Ray gets upset when Debra gives away all the 'baby stuff' at a family garage sale.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Wedding
programme.desc: Ray and Debra take a walk back in time to the very beginning when Ray proposed to Debra.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Wedding
programme.desc: Debra is swept-up in planning her wedding, leaving Ray wondering what's more important.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Invasion
programme.desc: The family moves to Marie and Frank's house when Ray's house is treated for termites.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Driving Frank
programme.desc: Debra decides that the kids can't ride with Frank after he has one too many accidents.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Maestro
programme.desc: Jerry seeks villa rentals in Tuscany after Elaine's boyfriend insists it's impossible.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Wink
programme.desc: George winks uncontrollably because of some grapefruit juice in his eye.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Hot Tub
programme.desc: Jerry is obsessed with ensuring that Elaine's houseguest, who had missed his Olympic event by oversleeping, won't miss the New York City Marathon. Kramer gets a hot tub from his friend.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Secret Code
programme.desc: George balks at giving Susan his secret bank code, but reveals it to Elaine's boss.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Phoebe's Dad
programme.desc: Phoebe travels to upstate New York in an attempt to locate her father.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Russ
programme.desc: Rachel says she's over Ross, but Russ, her new date, is a little too similar to Ross.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Lesbian Wedding
programme.desc: The gang attends the wedding of Ross's ex-wife where Monica is the caterer.

programme.title: Friends: The One After the Super Bowl
programme.desc: Ross decides to track down Marcel; Phoebe plays songs for children at the library.

programme.title: Friends: The One After the Super Bowl
programme.desc: Chandler is left in a restaurant wearing only underwear; Rachel and Monica have a fight.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Prom Video
programme.desc: Ross is determined to make Rachel see they should be together. An old video from Monica’s prom surfaces and Rachel sees how much Ross has always loved her. Joey buys Chandler a gold bracelet as a thank you gift.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross and Rachel ...You Know
programme.desc: Monica is attracted to an old family friend. Ross and Rachel have their first date.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Joey Moves Out
programme.desc: Phoebe talks Rachel into getting a tattoo with her and then chickens out; Joey moves out.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Eddie Moves In
programme.desc: Chandler gets a strange new roommate and Phoebe gets the chance to record 'Smelly Cat.'

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Dr. Ramoray Dies
programme.desc: Joey is finding success in playing Dr. Drake Ramoray on TV series 'Days of Our Lives'. He even has an interview published in TV magazine. Unfortunately, he also makes the mistake of telling the journalist he made up most of his own lines for the show.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Eddie Won't Go
programme.desc: Joey needs to move back in with Chandler but there are problems getting rid of Eddie.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Old Yeller Dies
programme.desc: Chandler and Joey invite Richard to a basketball game and he is the life of the party.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Paulie Pliosaurus/ Elmer Visits the Desert
programme.desc: The Pteranodon family visits a marine reptile called Paulie Pliosaurus, and takes their ocean friend Elmer Elasmosaurus to a place he's never been before.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That: A Long Winter's Nap/ The Tree Doctor
programme.desc: Sally and Nick are so excited to go ice-skating tomorrow that they can't fall asleep. They learn how Boris gets ready for his long winter's nap. Then, Sally's little maple sapling hasn't grown, so they go to meet Mr. Twiggles.

programme.title: Wild Kratts: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: The brothers come across a mischievous baby elephant and bring him back to the Tortuga HQ.

programme.title: Odd Squad: Skip Day/ The Great Grinaldi
programme.desc: When Olive catches a case of The Skips and goes missing, Otto must solve his first case by himself.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: In-depth conversations with global thought leaders and cultural influencers.

programme.title: This Old House Hour: Westerly Save the Flagpole; Stoop Planters, Fireplace Insert
programme.desc: The TVs and curtains are hung as the outdoor lights get installed and the flagpole is refurbished.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots: This Land Is My Land
programme.desc: Henry Louis Gates, Jr. reveals the unexpected family trees of entertainer Queen Latifah and actor Jeffrey Wright, redefining their sense of the black experience — and challenging preconceptions about America’s past.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow: Winterthur Museum, Garden & Library (Hour Two)
programme.desc: Discover Delaware treasures appraised at Winterthur Museum, Garden & Library such as Stephen King first editions from 1974-1977, an Ilya Schor silver plate and a Louis Comfort Tiffany oil, ca. 1870.

programme.title: Expedition With Steve Backshall: Oman: Desert Canyon
programme.desc: Steve leads an expedition in the Jebel Akhdar mountain range of Oman. With temperatures soaring, dehydration and heat stroke are a constant threat.

programme.title: Nature: Hippos: Africa's River Giants
programme.desc: Discover an unexpected side of these aquatic mammals that can’t even swim as hippos protect their families, face their enemies and suffer in a drought.

programme.title: Nova: Jupiter
programme.desc: Jupiter's massive gravitational force made it a wrecking ball when it barreled through the early solar system. But it also shaped life on Earth, delivering comets laden with water and perhaps even the fateful asteroid that wiped out the dinosaurs.

programme.title: Sit and Be Fit: Music and Novelty
programme.desc: Mary Ann matches her movements to an engaging staccato melody. A seated brain is introduced.

programme.title: Arthur: He Said, He Said/ Bunny Trouble
programme.desc: Bionic Bunny is interrupted, and Arthur, Buster, and George try to remember what comes next.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: How We Found Your Sun/ Treehouse Observatory
programme.desc: Jet explains how his family found Earth by way of the Sun, a star in the Milky Way galaxy.

programme.title: Nature Cat: Where Have All the Butterflies Gone?!/ For the Birdies!
programme.desc: Nature Cat and his pals decide to build a butterfly garden before the butterflies have to fly off.

programme.title: Splash and Bubbles: Guess Who?/ Sleepless Sleepover
programme.desc: Splash, Dunk and Bubbles try to help a lost fish. Then, Splash joins Bubbles, Dunk, and Ripple for a sleepover in the Sandy Bed.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Suki’s Bone/ Brand New Flag
programme.desc: When Suki digs up an old bone tool covered with markings, Molly, Tooey, and Oscar discover the playful pooch has made an important archeological discovery. Molly announces a contest to design an original flag for the Denali Trading Post.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: We Are the Wright Brothers/ We Are the Bronte Sisters
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Xavier, Yadina, & Brad as they travel back to meet famous heroes.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: Hoopin' Hopper/ A Chopsticky Situation
programme.desc: When Andy loses his basketball in Beijing, he learns that although competitive sports are fun, friendship is more important than winning.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Dance Problem/ Follow the Bouncing Ball
programme.desc: Peg and Cat dance with their idol Misty Copeland, but Cat's tail becomes a big obstacle. Cat chases his favorite ball as it bounces through ten different worlds to ten different beats.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Tiger Family Trip
programme.desc: The Tiger Family takes a road trip to see Grandpere, they sing and play games, enjoy a dinosaur-themed playground, and explore a butterfly garden on their way.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Hey! Sesame Street News
programme.desc: Cookie Monster becomes a journalist for Abby and Big Bird's newspaper, 'Hey Sesame Street News!'.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Slumber Party/ Puptastic
programme.desc: Pinkalicious and her friends imagine a friendly pink dragon at a Princess of Pink slumber party.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Pies
programme.desc: In the Signature, the bakers must master a perfect Wellington. The fiendishly difficult Technical challenge, hand-raised pies, proves the downfall of many. American pies are the Showstopper feature.

programme.title: Masterpiece Mystery!: Grantchester
programme.desc: Sidney’s former flame throws an engagement party that leads to murder. To crack the case, Sidney and Geordie must break a code of silence.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: My Mother and Other Strangers
programme.desc: Find out if Nurse Tillie can come to the rescue in time and see why stolen paint provokes a theological crisis. Capt. Dreyfuss gives Rose a heads-up.

programme.title: The Lawrence Welk Show: This Colorful World
programme.desc: Sandi Griffiths hosts this feature of songs that have the word 'colour' in their title.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Dolls
programme.desc: The detectives search for a killer after the body of a sexually molested girl is found.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Waste
programme.desc: The detectives learn that a doctor is impregnating comatose female patients with a wealthy donor's sperm to obtain biologically compatible embryonic stem cells.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Beast's Obsession
programme.desc: William Lewis breaks out of prison, continues his killing spree and takes a 12-year-old girl hostage in an effort to lure Sergeant Benson to him. With time running out, Benson must decide how much she is willing to sacrifice in order to save the child.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Post-Mortem Blues
programme.desc: In the moments after William Lewis' death, Sergeant Benson is rescued by the SVU squad, but her torment continues. The Internal Affairs investigation of her actions is deemed inconclusive, and with no evidence to corroborate her story, she risks arrest.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Thought Criminal
programme.desc: Under the guidance of Lieutenant Murphy, Sergeant Benson and the SVU take an active approach to catching sex offenders. They target Simon Wilkes, a well-regarded photographer with a secret life.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Maternal Instincts
programme.desc: Rollins' mother Beth throws her a baby shower while the SVU reports to a four-star hotel where a famous violinist was raped by her colleague. The investigation leads to the shocking return of Rollins' sister Kim.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Sketchy Area
programme.desc: Phil stumbles into an exciting new career after dropping by Luke's college; while Claire deals with her dad, Jay, and the merger of Pritchett's Closets with a tech-savvy, hipper company.

programme.title: Modern Family: Torn Between Two Lovers
programme.desc: Haley can't seem to choose between her past and present relationships and is forced to decide. Meanwhile, Manny returns to college and dorm life while his girlfriend, Sherry, continues to stay at Jay and Gloria's.

programme.title: Modern Family: Bixby's Back
programme.desc: To avoid becoming a boring couple, Phil and Claire revisit a roleplaying rendezvous from the previous Valentine's Day. Meanwhile, Jay plans an elaborate surprise for Gloria, and an admirer comes between Cameron and Mitchell on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Modern Family: Did the Chicken Cross the Road?
programme.desc: When Cam forgets the words to his favourite country song, he blames Mitch and decides he needs to reconnect with his roots and get a chicken. Meanwhile, Alex is up for a prestigious government job that requires a family interview.

programme.title: Modern Family: Kids These Days
programme.desc: Haley needs a little motherly advice from Claire as she considers her future with Dylan and her career. Meanwhile, Jay and Cam’s less than politically correct coaching style earns them a class on sensitivity.

programme.title: Modern Family: Putting Down Roots
programme.desc: Dede's husband, Jerry, comes to town to bequeath her possessions to the family. Mitch and Claire receive a little more of Dede than they really know what to do with, Jay and Gloria feel sorry for Jerry and invite him to stay with them while he is in town.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Moving Day
programme.desc: Claire and Phil aren't convinced that Haley and Dylan can make it on their own as they move them into their new apartment before the baby arrives. Meanwhile, Pameron gets out of prison early and has a bone to pick with Mitchell.

programme.title: Modern Family: Blasts From the Past
programme.desc: Phil and Claire decide to take a cycling tour through Italy before they become grandparents, and Dylan introduces them to his mom who has an interesting past.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forty-Caliber Bread Crumb
programme.desc: While out on a bank run for his off-duty security job, Halstead and his co-workers find themselves under attack by a violent robbery crew which quickly becomes a full-scale shoot-out.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Kasual With a K
programme.desc: While responding to a call of shots fired, Voight, Antonio and Halstead come across a secret battered women's shelter and discover the owner has been wounded.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: If We Were Normal
programme.desc: When a call comes in about a woman stabbing a man then fleeing the scene, Burgess and Lindsay go investigate and find a young woman with the weapon in her hand.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: In a Duffle Bag
programme.desc: Voight responds to a call about a suspicious duffle bag, and uncovers a frigid newborn baby. Determined to find the culprit who abandoned the infant, Intelligence receives a promising lead based on information provided by Chicago Med.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Lady Heather's Box
programme.desc: Grissom is attracted to Lady Heather, until he learns that she is a murder suspect.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Spiral
programme.desc: While Callen is undercover in the mail room of an office building to investigate an arms dealer, it is taken over by terrorists and Callen becomes a hostage. When the team arrives to help, they discover the entire building is wired with explosives.

programme.title: NCIS: Iceman
programme.desc: The team investigates when a marine thought to have frozen to death wakes up on Ducky's autopsy table. With the young man on life support, the team tracks his movements in the day before he was left for dead and discovers a secret trip to Baghdad.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Don't Read the News
programme.desc: After the body of a young woman is found with multiple gunshot wounds, Intelligence discovers this case may be connected with several other cases, and they uncover a serial killer is working in Chicago.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Wish
programme.desc: When a mutilated sex offender is found dead, it is unclear if he was the victim of a crime. As intelligence questions those related to the case, they find themselves up against a special police force that may be covering up illegal activities.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sanctuary
programme.desc: After a female jogger is brutally murdered in the park, Rixton and Atwater arrive to find two suspects fleeing the scene. When the men enter a church, the priest blocks the police from entering the building.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: I Remember Her Now
programme.desc: The body of a young girl is found crushed in an abandoned building after she runs away from a treatment centre for troubled girls. Voight sends Halstead to work undercover inside the centre, where he believes something shady is happening.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Seven Indictments
programme.desc: When a charred body is found in a torched house, Intelligence must work to identify the victim, as well as a young boy who is found badly injured inside. As they work towards identifying the victim, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Juvenile
programme.desc: A drug raid uncovers the body of a suspected marijuana dealer, who was raped and stabbed.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Resilience
programme.desc: When a rape victim attempts to commit suicide, the detectives vehemently search for her rapists.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa's First Word

programme.title: Movie: The Last Stand

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Ex’s & Oh’s

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Between a Rock and a Hard Place

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Miami: There's No Way
programme.desc: Miami mourns alongside Trina as she says goodbye to her mother. Amara gets ready to unveil her new single and her new relationship. Trick Daddy finds new love. A bomb drop about Trina's former business partner threatens to unravel Amara's career plans.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Miami: On the Record
programme.desc: Amara confronts the allegations that her manager, Jullian, stole money from Trina head on. Trina decides to pursue an all girls tour. Trick asks Trina to consider his woman for the tour. Joseline Hernandez lands in Miami.

programme.title: Martin: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: Gina is angry when Martin makes insensitive remarks about women on his radio show.

programme.title: Martin: The Gift Rapper
programme.desc: Martin tries to find Gina the perfect anniversary gift.

programme.title: Martin: Things I Do for Love
programme.desc: Martin takes Gina out to a dance club for a romantic date.

programme.title: Martin: Boys R' Us
programme.desc: Martin tries to let everyone know that he wears the pants in his relationship.

programme.title: Martin: Dead Men Don't Flush
programme.desc: A plumber that Martin hires dies in the bathroom while on the job.

programme.title: Martin: Forever Sheneneh
programme.desc: Sheneneh wins a date with Christopher Reid on Martin's radio show.

programme.title: Martin: I'm Not Your Superwoman
programme.desc: When Martin is sick with the flu, Gina stays home to take care of him.

programme.title: Martin: Woman With a Past
programme.desc: After he finds out that a recent radio guest once dated Gina, Martin becomes jealous.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Deck the Halls

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Lucky Charms
programme.desc: Philip risks losing a big account when he advises a client to stop listening to Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Ethnic Tip
programme.desc: Will complains that no black history is being taught in his school and Vivian takes over.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Philip becomes very upset when Will sneaks out with Philip's mother to a rap concert.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: It Had to Be You
programme.desc: Jazz fixes Will up with his sister, Janet, who turns out to be an extremely bossy girl.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Nice Lady
programme.desc: Will tries to prove that he's a responsible person so he can take the car to Nevada.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Love at First Fight
programme.desc: One of Vivian's college students' grades start to slide when she starts dating Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Banks Shot

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: 72 Hours
programme.desc: Carlton accepts Will's challenge to survive two days in a tough Los Angeles neighbourhood.

programme.title: Movie: Good Deeds

programme.title: Movie: Death at a Funeral

programme.title: Movie: My Favorite Wedding
programme.desc: The maid of honour is stood up by her boyfriend and befriends the groom's best man. She then has to decide to go back to her old life or pursue a new one.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Bride

programme.title: Movie: Love's Complicated
programme.desc: Leah thinks all is fine coasting in her relationship with Edward who enrolls her in a conflict-management class. She locks horns with a radio-talk show host but develops new friendships and inner strength.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Ice
programme.desc: A former figure skater gets an improbably shot to reclaim skating glory when a young coach sees greatness in her. They find their love of skating goes far beyond the ice.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy
programme.desc: A man Blanche has no memory of returns from the Persian Gulf in hopes of fulfilling the promise she supposedly made to him before he left, that she will be his and only his.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring
programme.desc: The Pope's in town and Sophia goes to his mass. When she goes to kiss his ring, it slips off into hers. Meanwhile, Rose is convinced Miles is hiding something from her, so as a birthday gift, Blanche gives Rose a detective to spy on Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Boyfriends

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Goodbye, Mr. Gordon

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Commitments
programme.desc: Dorothy asks Blanche to go out with her blind date when she wins tickets to Beatlemania.

programme.title: Frasier: An Affair to Forget
programme.desc: After receiving a call from a listener, Frasier suspects Maris is having an affair with her fencing instructor.

programme.title: Frasier: Agents in America, Part Three

programme.desc: As associate producer of Wake Up Miami, Rose needs a hot news story for sweeps week.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: An ancient family curse requires Sophia to save Dorothy by performing strange tasks.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: The full moon and festivities prompt strange happenings including Blanche's jewelry being swiped, Sophia trying to break a curse, and Dorothy and Miles sharing a passionate kiss.
