programme.title: The Closer: Culture Shock
programme.desc: When a Chinese businesswoman is found dead on the tour bus she and her husband operate, Brenda and the squad must dig deep to investigate her past life. Meanwhile, Brenda's parents reveal to the squad that Brenda and Fritz are engaged.

programme.title: The Closer: Lover's Leap
programme.desc: A car belonging to a Department of Homeland Security employee is found wrecked at the bottom of Mulholland Drive. Priority Homicide is brought in to uncover the details surrounding the driver's death, but the investigation leads Brenda close to home.

programme.title: The Closer: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Johnson's investigation into a famous Hollywood divorce attorney found floating in his swimming pool is under heavy scrutiny. Meanwhile, Fritz and Brenda are trying to consolidate their bills, but Brenda discovers a secret.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Twisted Sitters
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie are caught in an embarrassing situation while babysitting for the Palmers.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Work Related
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon keep raising the stakes in an effort to play the best practical joke.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Better Camera
programme.desc: Doug surprises Carrie with a new camera for Christmas, and Arthur writes a script.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Wedding Presence
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie try to come up with a way out of attending their friend's wedding.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hi-Def Jam
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon will stop at nothing to watch the Super Bowl on HDTV.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Paint Misbehavin
programme.desc: Deacon has a paintball birthday party; Carrie tells Doug she finds Deacon attractive.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Deacon Blues
programme.desc: Doug is surprised to find his married best friend, Deacon, out with another woman.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Horizontal Hold
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug ban sex for two weeks, forcing them to resolve their conflicts verbally.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 1)
programme.desc: During a terrifying three-day period in late August 1990, five college students were found brutally murdered in Gainesville, Florida.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 2)
programme.desc: After five murders it would take investigators months - and the discovery of a campsite, a screwdriver and an audio tape - before they identified who the serial killer was.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet

programme.desc: It's Christmas-time in Nashville and Kristin and Jay find themselves with conflicting opinions on how to decorate their house for the holidays. This year, Kristin wants to throw the biggest holiday party that Uncommon James has seen.

programme.title: Very Cavallari: Uncommon Beginnings
programme.desc: Kristin's business is booming, with brand new Uncommon James offices, a wildly growing staff, and massive plans for expansion. Brittainy's work life's going great, but her relationship with Stone is on the rocks.

programme.title: Very Cavallari: Out With The Old
programme.desc: Kristin heads to Chicago to meet up with her friend Biegs and check out spaces for a potential second UJ store, but is on edge about finding out if she's going to get her dream space or not. Justin's boyfriend Scoot arrives.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Fraser Fabulous
programme.desc: Matt Fraser is a psychic medium, but he couldn't see the future clearly enough to know that hiring his family would lead to trouble. After a breakdown, he asks his stylist to make the Frasers look more professional.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Morning Cookie
programme.desc: Matt's parents, Rod and Angela, move in with Matt and have their 'morning cookie' day and night and psychic powers can't save him now! Alexa kicks off her beauty pageant prep and Matt helps her pick out his perfect pageant dress.

programme.title: Botched: Zombie Breasts
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif kicks the butt off a patient' nose, while Dr. Dubrow helps a single mother whose breast implant fell out while brushing her teeth. Meanwhile, a transgender twin needs the doctors help in completing her Bimbo Barbie transformation.

programme.title: Botched: Most Outrageous OMG Patients Countdown
programme.desc: A countdown of Botched most outrageous patients. Dr. Dubrow and Dr. Nassif see some over the top patients, including a Brittany Spears wannabe, a contestant from Ru Paul's Drag Race, and a life-like space elf.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: True Hollywood Story: Angelina Jolie
programme.desc: This 29-year-old Oscar winner is one of Hollywood's sexiest stars, and her public image has evolved from quirky, blood sucking wild child to devoted single mom and philanthropist.

programme.title: E! True Hollywood Story: Does Hip-Hop Reject Women?
programme.desc: The history of hip hop has often been told through the eyes of the men who dominate the charts. But badass female rappers have been battling for equality since the beginning.

programme.title: E! True Hollywood Story: Is Fame an Addiction?
programme.desc: The seduction of fame and celebrity have long played a part in the desire to reach superstar status.

programme.title: E! True Hollywood Story: Who Is Kim Kardashian West?
programme.desc: Kim Kardashian West, arguably the most famous woman in the world, changed the face of social media. See how a reality TV star parlay her massive following into a billion-dollar business.

programme.title: E! News
programme.desc: The biggest and most talked about stories of the day in pop culture.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: Binge Eating Bachelorette/ Drill Sergeant
programme.desc: Crysta has started binge eating because she isn't happy in her relationship. With Khloé's guidance and the help of her celebrity trainer, Harley Pasternak, she tries to find what truly makes her happy.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: Revenge-ance and Uber-Entitled
programme.desc: Khloe helps Jill rediscover her true self; Sukhda tries to prove friends and family wrong.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: Muscle Cub and the DUFF
programme.desc: Khloe and her team of experts help Will with his weight and Stephanie with her confidence.

programme.title: Pop of the Morning
programme.desc: 'The Inheritance' star Tony Goldwyn joins us live in studio.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Hollywood's happy hour in the middle of the day where it belongs.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Fraser Fabulous

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Morning Cookie
programme.desc: Matt's parents, Rod and Angela, move in with Matt and have their 'morning cookie' day and night and psychic powers can't save him now! Alexa kicks off her beauty pageant prep and Matt helps her pick out his perfect pageant dress.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Tangled Web
programme.desc: Kim fears for her surrogate's safety when sources begin exposing her personal information, Kris keeps a watchful eye on Scott during Fashion Week, and Kourtney deals with a scary infestation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kris Jenner's Legacy
programme.desc: When Scott realizes that the girls know very little about Kris's history, he sets out to make her a commemorative legacy video. Meanwhile Kendall's anxiety strikes again right before Milan Fashion week.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Red Hot
programme.desc: A smokehouse master and a Californian take on Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Windy City Wants More
programme.desc: Toronto's David Adjey and Chicago's Cory Morris determine whether Chopped judge Scott Conant or Internet star Hannah Hart will go up against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Revenge Is Best Served Bold
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's former co-worker Leia Gaccione and Asian expert Tony Nguyen are back for more, returning to the arena for a second chance to take Bobby down.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sticky Situation
programme.desc: The competition sweetens up when pastry chefs Clarice Lam and Avery Ruzicka heat up the ovens for the chance to take on Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Clear the Deck
programme.desc: It's all hands-on deck when Napa Valley's Daniel Gomez Sanchez competes against Atlanta's Matthew Ridgway. TV host Daphne Oz and Food Network's Eddie Jackson hold nothing back when it comes to slaying Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Choc-O-Love
programme.desc: Alton Brown and Valerie Bertinelli don't want a rocky road on the way to beating Bobby Flay. They use their chocolate expertise to decide whether acclaimed pastry chef David Lebovitz or chef-of-all-trades Ryan Scott will be able to fight Bobby.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: When Life Gives You Lemons
programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine's in for a 2-in-1 challenge when he's tasked with fixing the Zest Bistro, located inside the Lemon Tree Grocer in Downers Grove, Ill.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: In 2012, Robert met his match in one of the owners of Woody’s, a steakhouse in Tupelo. With over half a million in debt, Robert forced the mother-daughter team to take a hard look in the mirror. He returns to see if the business is still going.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Old Habits Die Hard
programme.desc: At Perella's Ristorante in Warren, R.I., Chef Robert Irvine meets an owner whose stubbornness is holding back his restaurant. He hasn't updated the menu, the decor or his opinions since the place opened 25 years ago.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: America's Funniest Food Show
programme.desc: Things get zany in the kitchen when the king of dad jokes, actor and comedian Bob Saget, teams up with Worst Cooks' Anne Burrell to get the last laugh on Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Finding Stars
programme.desc: Food Network's Giada De Laurentiis and People Magazine's Jess Cagle reach for the stars when they match up Atlanta's dynamic Greek chef Pano Karatassos and New York City's Mimi Weissenborn to take down Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Pioneering Ordeal
programme.desc: Chef Alex Guarnaschelli links up with the Pioneer Woman, Ree Drummond, to orchestrate a loss. Two southern gentlemen, Atlanta's Jamarium Banks and Vince Giancarlo from Charlotte, North Carolina won't be playing nice as they try to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Against The Grain
programme.desc: Chopped host Ted Allen and Food Network's Damaris Phillips try to rewrite history. Attempting to make Bobby Flay's domination a thing of the past are Southern heirloom chef Paul Fehribach and spunky pan-Asian chef Sara Nguyen.

programme.desc: It's food on the move with Ina Garten as she shares pro tips for perfect portable eats. She makes moist lemon poppy seed cake for an afternoon snack at work and tomato mozzarella pan bagnat.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Fearless Food
programme.desc: Ina Garten is tackling daunting dishes with easy techniques, from a perfectly risen souffle a l'orange to overcoming pastry fears with her totally professional-looking Anna's tomato tart.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Make-Ahead Breakfast
programme.desc: Ina prepares a breakfast that includes raspberry baked French toast and mini Italian frittatas.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cooking For Jeffrey: It Must Be Friday

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cooking for Jeffrey: Deans for Dinner
programme.desc: Ina Garten's throwing a celebration meal for her friend Deborah Berke, who has been named the Dean of the Yale Architecture School. She's making a sensational paella salad, a platter of goat cheese, English oat crackers and fig preserves.

programme.desc: It's the most delicious invite in London as passionate vegetarian Mary McCartney puts her own spin on American classics for lunch with her friend Stanley Tucci. Mary shares family stories while making black bean burgers, thousand island dressing and more.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Bankrupt Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a good deal in a familiar neighbourhood in Anaheim, CA. They need to act fast if they want to lock it in, but they have to make an offer without seeing the inside.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Flea Bag Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a house in Rowland Heights, CA. This three-bedroom, two-bath house should be a quick flip, but once they get inside they find big problems that will take all their skills to fix.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Toxic Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a small house that's aggressively priced and could be a lucrative deal based on comparable sales in the neighbourhood. They go to inspect the house before making a decision and find it boarded up and in rough shape.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Thrifty vs. Glitzy
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by friend and investor, Pete de Best. Pete has found a newer construction home in Orange, California that needs cosmetic updating and should prove to be a fast, simple flip.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: The Money Pit
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a listing in Norwalk, California with such an attractive opportunity for profit based on comparable properties that they immediately make an offer on the property, sight unseen.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Junk Yard Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot an interesting property in Long Beach, California as they peruse the day's listings. It's a very small house with a massive structure in the backyard.

programme.title: House Hunters: Crazy About Chickens
programme.desc: A young couple's first house hunt in Fort Collins, CO, is more complicated than they ever expected. They're looking for a home that has space for their family to grow and a private backyard where their chickens can roam free.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Worlds Apart in Bangkok
programme.desc: Newlyweds that dated long distance are moving in together for the first time as they follow her job to Bangkok, Thailand. She's a world traveler who wants to live close to her job, in the heart of the city, but he's looking for peace and quiet.

programme.title: House Hunters: Historic House in Michigan
programme.desc: A Michigan couple searches for a historic home with tons of charm. He'd like a place that's already updated to avoid the hassle of renovating, while she'd love to find a fixer-upper they can personalize.

programme.title: House Hunters: A First Home in Phoenix
programme.desc: A young couple is on the hunt for their first home in Phoenix. He wants a newly built house with modern style and a backyard, while she prefers something that's old, charming and has lots of storage.

programme.title: House Hunters: Dr. Seeks Mid-Century Modern in Palm Springs
programme.desc: A doctor and her boyfriend look for a mid-century home in Palm Springs, California, but since some are suggesting he produce a ring before moving in, their living situation isn't a sure thing.

programme.title: House Hunters: St. Louis Waterfront Search
programme.desc: A St. Louis radio personality is ready to get into her very first home. An avid angler, she's hoping her new house will be on the water so that she can fish any time she wants.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Dream House in Poland
programme.desc: A Polish-Irish couple craving historic European culture decides to look for a new home in Konstancin, Poland. They want a character-filled home for their two daughters with a suburban feel, plenty of green space and easy access to Warsaw's city centre.

programme.title: House Hunters: Iowa 'Famcave'
programme.desc: She wants a brand-new, practical home that fits their growing family, but he wants an older historical place.

programme.title: House Hunters: Ranch vs. Spanish-Style in Florida
programme.desc: Buyers want to find a home in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, but they can't agree on a style. She wants a one-story rancher with an updated kitchen, but he's looking for a two-story, Spanish-style house with a garage.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Finding Comforts in Bangalore
programme.desc: Adventure-loving Nik couldn't pass up a job offer in Bangalore, India, and while Misty lived with him in Europe before, India will be a drastic difference, and she's determined to find Western comforts in their new home.

programme.title: House Hunters: Huntin' in Hawaii
programme.desc: A couple wants to upgrade from their small condo in Honolulu to a bigger space for their growing family with an open floor plan and lots of curb appeal.

programme.title: House Hunters: Ranch vs. Craftsman in New Jersey
programme.desc: An animal lover and her pipe-fitter husband have different ideas for what they want in their next home in central New Jersey. She wants a Craftsman with a lot of land for animal rescues, but he's looking for a move-in ready ranch with a small yard.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Living the Dream in Bonaire
programme.desc: A couple of avid divers from Texas hope to find a home on one of the most beautiful diving locations in the Caribbean. After spending years in Houston, the couple cannot wait to spend their days taking dives and making new friends on the beautiful island.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: A Healthy Plan in Roatan
programme.desc: An adventurous Florida couple is interested in a healthier lifestyle. They'd love to move somewhere with less development and more natural beauty.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Grand Adventure on Grand Cayman
programme.desc: A Canadian couple is tired of long winters in Toronto and wants to spend more time outdoors. After falling in love with Grand Cayman on a snorkeling trip, they want to be as close to the water as possible so they can spend more time together.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Return to Island Living in the Dominican Republic
programme.desc: A young couple that grew up in the Caribbean are ready to escape the cold in Toronto and return to island living with their five children. They plan to open a luxury beachfront hotel, but first, they must find a house with enough space for the family.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Heading Home to St. Thomas
programme.desc: A couple and their two young daughters are returning to St. Thomas after spending years in unforgiving Minnesota winters. They want to find a house or condo with tons of outdoor living space to take full advantage of the Caribbean paradise.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: St. Croix Is the Bee's Knees
programme.desc: After meeting in Grand Cayman, a pair of accountants are ready to find a place to settle down together. They both love living in the Caribbean, and a new job has given them the option of moving to St. Croix, US Virgin Islands.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Diving Into Bonaire
programme.desc: A couple of scuba-diving enthusiasts are looking for a slower pace of life away from hot and land-locked Arizona.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: California Flair in Panama
programme.desc: An adventurous California couple that loves to travel is ready for a change. After taking a trip to Bocas del Toro, Panama, they realized the region would be a great spot to start their dream business.

programme.title: Movie: A Night to Regret
programme.desc: A female college student meets up with her estranged childhood best friend and is unprepared for the events that follow.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Mother
programme.desc: Stella Marshall finds herself on the outs with her own rebellious daughter Shay, she soon attracts the attention of a dangerous teen fan girl named Peyton who will stop at nothing to make Stella the perfect mother of her own.

programme.title: Movie: Kidnapped by a Classmate
programme.desc: A girl starts fresh in a new town and makes friends with a guy from school, unbeknownst to her, he has ulterior motives, which leads to her kidnapping.

programme.title: Movie: A Mother's Worst Fear
programme.desc: Alice is starting a new chapter in life by moving on from her highly stressful job as a hostage negotiator and putting more focus on her family. Suddenly, her world is turned upside down when her daughter is abducted with no demand for ransom.

programme.title: Movie: Mommy Would Never Hurt You

programme.title: Movie: The Other Mother
programme.desc: Jackie tries not to let it bother her when her ex-husband's new wife bonds with her teenage daughter. But the stepmother turns the teen against Jackie and begins to lead her down a dark path.

programme.title: Movie: Double Daddy
programme.desc: Amanda learns her boyfriend Connor has impregnated a new girl at school and is shocked to find out that she too is pregnant. Connor does everything he can to be there for both girls but the high school drama takes social backstabbing to a new level.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Old Montana State Prison

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Colorado Gold Mine

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Hell Hole Prison

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Cerro Gordo Ghost Town
programme.desc: Zak and the crew trek a treacherous cliffside trail to investigate a former mining town haunted by the lost souls of its former residents.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Screaming Room: The Ex-Files

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Extra Pulses: Lewis Flats School
programme.desc: Zak and the crew land in Deming, NM, to investigate a mysterious school situated on land that is soaked with the spirits of the Apache and their violent struggle to keep it from the pioneers during the 1800s.

programme.desc: Zak and the crew stick together as they investigate a 127-year-old hospital in Colfax, WA. The building may be abandoned, but it's far from quiet with reports of visitors hearing strange growls and being attacked by unseen hands.

programme.title: A Haunting: Provoking Evil
programme.desc: A Massachusetts historian's seance performance leaves him possessed and desperate for safety. His friend calls on a shaman to break the frightening psychic connection between him and the spirit of a cold-blooded murderer.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon Whispers
programme.desc: When a man's beloved father dies, he falls into a deep depression that renders him vulnerable to an unearthly evil who will stop at nothing to make him a pawn in its relentless thirst for misery and murder.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunted Cabinet
programme.desc: After a couple brings an antique cabinet into their home, they capture actual video evidence proving it’s haunted.

programme.title: A Haunting: House of Nightmares
programme.desc: When a woman experiences paranormal activity inside her family's new home, she suspects spirits tied to the historic Victorian's past. She soon fears something far more sinister is lurking after an unseen entity attacks her in bed.

programme.title: A Haunting: Gateway to Evil
programme.desc: A devastated teen holds a seance to communicate with her recently deceased friend, but unwittingly unleashes a malevolent entity into her home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Wicked Eviction
programme.desc: A single mother relocates her family for a fresh start, but her dream turns to a nightmare when they are antagonized by multiple entities. Desperate to keep her children safe, she finds a paranormal team who reveal the true evil in the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Past
programme.desc: A woman turns to her faith for protection after she begins experiencing supernatural events in her quiet Pennsylvania home. But when her children are targeted by the entity, she seeks the aid of paranormal investigators to end the cycle of terror.

programme.title: Haunted Towns: Vigilante Vengeance
programme.desc: The Tennesse Wraith Chasers are in uncharted territory as they head to Montana for the first time to investigate the haunted streets of Virginia City, a Wild West town known for its excessive crime and mass hangings.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Love and Listings
programme.desc: Flagg and Bobby work together on their first co-list and Flagg gets emotional during their wedding rehearsal diner. Tracy's ex-client comes crawling back, while Josh Altman faces a tough deadline to sell a tear-down on the Riviera Golf Course.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: The Brits host a luxurious open house for their $45 million dollar Bel Air listing, and sparks fly when Flagg and Altman come face to face. Madison gets creative in selling a Malibu Country home, while Flagg and Bobby tie the knot in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Below Deck: Witch Hunt
programme.desc: Kevin spirals out in response to charter guest, and professional chef, Justine telling him to 'step it up.' Much to Ashton's dismay, Kate returns and interferes in the deck team's drama. Simone sets out to become a better Second Stew.

programme.title: Below Deck: Public Displays of Affection
programme.desc: Alexis Bellino and her new beau come aboard the Valor to celebrate her recent divorce. After the deck team deals with major issues, Lee comes to a decision about Rhylee's future, forcing Ashton to change his management style.

programme.title: Project Runway: Sew 80's
programme.desc: The iconic Cyndi Lauper is both inspiration and guest judge for this totally tubular team challenge. Split into two teams, the designers must create cohesive mini-collections to pay homage to Cyndi's 80's fashion trailblazing that brought Punk mainstream.

programme.title: Project Runway: There Is Only One You
programme.desc: The designers are given a chance to think about their family history and channel those stories and emotions into a look of their choosing. Luckily, there's a surprise early on that will help boost their chances for success in the challenge.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live
programme.desc: Karlie Kloss and Martha Stewart visit.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Snake Bye
programme.desc: Porsha is taken by surprise when ex-fiancé Dennis pops up with a ring and unexpected question. Toronto Carnival becomes a circus of intrigue at the final dinner when accusations fly about infidelities and a mysterious lady.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey: Mama Drama
programme.desc: Margaret hosts a Mother's Day drag brunch, but spars with her mother over the logistics of her move. Jennifer tries to convince her mother to accept her brother's sexuality. Jackie plans a trip to the Hamptons to get Margaret and Teresa to make up.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Training Days
programme.desc: Scheana claims she no longer has feelings for her ex Max, but when the new server Dayna starts dating him, Scheana makes Dayna's life at SUR very difficult. Stassi, Katie and Brittany grow frustrated with Kristen's refusal to cut ties with Carter.

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker: The Trust Fund Brat and the Cliffdiver
programme.desc: Thirty-three-year-old Ian Bernardo is an art dealer and a spoiled trust fund brat who lives in New York City. Ian stands to inherit tens of millions of dollars, but the one thing missing in his life is true love. Ian has come to Patti to find him a man.

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker: Mr. Superficial and the Nutjob Magnet
programme.desc: Forty-seven-year-old Robbie Mione is a successful former optician with many rich clients. Now a man of leisure, he's looking to get married, but his superficiality and jokes keep him from connecting with women.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: Kelly covers Elle King's 'Ex's & Oh's' and gives shout-outs to a cool physics teacher from Tidewater, Virginia and a new face of science from Santa Clara, California.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Reunion, Part Three
programme.desc: The 'bye wig' party saga continues and Marlo is accused of adding fuel to the fallout. Cynthia talks about her relationship with Mike Hill, while hinting at a wedding. Eva's wedding, and her finances, take center stage. Nene and Cynthia go head to head.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: The Moore the Merrier
programme.desc: Kenya relishes in her new role as mom to her daughter Brooklyn, while struggling to maintain her long distance marriage to Marc. Porsha's relationship with Dennis hits a rough patch after he betrays her trust. Eva feels the pressure of a baby on the way.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Cheatin' Heart
programme.desc: Cynthia and Kandi try to clean up the mess of the Barbie bash aftermath. After learning about Eva's distrust, Kenya unleashes her unfiltered thoughts on Cynthia. While struggling to make sense of her relationship, Porsha drops a bomb no one expects.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: The Float Goes On
programme.desc: Eva and Cynthia continue to get closer as some of the ladies get ready to head to World Pride in New York City. Kenya confides in her family that she and Marc are having problems. Prosha checks on in Tanya as she struggles to move on from Dennis.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Love, Marriage and Sour Peaches
programme.desc: Cynthia and Nene come face-to-face for the first time since their fall-out. Porsha comes to grips with Dennis's unfaithfulness, and plans for her future. Kandi and Todd bring Ace to an ultrasound appointment to help him adjust to being a big brother.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: The Re-gift that Keeps on Giving
programme.desc: Kenya reveals some intimate details about her troubled marriage to Porsha during a play date. Kandi drops Riley off in New York City for a summer-long internship at a law firm, and Nene and Marlo have a make-up lunch after their blow up in New York.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Where There's a Wig, There's a Way
programme.desc: Kandi and Todd continue to deal with their parenting differences. Kenya puts all her energy into her business. Nene invites Kandi to lunch and reveals some disturbing information about Cynthia, and Eva's husband worries about her overworking herself.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: What Would Michelle O Do?
programme.desc: Marlo takes Porsha on a hookah and Hennessy-fueled pedal tour to get her mind off her break up. Kenya deals with her own relationship issues and visits an estate lawyer to discuss the worst-case scenario. Rumours abound that someone recorded Cynthia.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Head Over 'Hills'

programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: The Making of Planet Earth
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of 'Planet Earth' and inside the massive project to create the epic 11-part series.

programme.title: Planet Earth: South Pacific: Fragile Paradise
programme.desc: The South Pacific remains a fragile paradise, with little to no protection while also being home to rich coral reefs and iconic ocean wildlife.

programme.title: Planet Earth: South Pacific: Ocean of Islands
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the 20,000 islands and inhibit the Pacific ocean. Narrated by Benedict Cumberbatch.

programme.title: Planet Earth: South Pacific: Castaways
programme.desc: The story of the ultimate castaways who succeeded against all odds.

programme.title: Planet Earth: South Pacific: Endless Blue
programme.desc: The greatest shipwreck of all time reveals the lengths animals that reside in the ocean go to for survival.

programme.title: Planet Earth: South Pacific: Ocean of Volcanoes
programme.desc: The birth, growth, and death of an island in the Pacific ocean. Featuring images of an erupting underwater volcano and rivers of lava below the waves.

programme.title: Planet Earth: South Pacific: Strange Islands
programme.desc: The evolution of wildlife in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: One Ocean
programme.desc: A journey from the intense heat of the tropics to the planet's frozen poles. Life has spread to almost every part of the ocean, but there are many different worlds within it, and each presents unique challenges.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Deep
programme.desc: Visit the unknown to discover an unimaginable abundance of life in the pitch-black darkness of the seabed. Antarctica is the coldest, harshest and most remote continent on earth.

programme.desc: The troopers police the 4 day 25th annual Arctic Man festival that hosts over 12,000 partygoers.

programme.desc: The troopers come across a hunter using unlawful bait while investigating illegal fur trappers. Meanwhile, a house that is fully engulfed in flames presents a danger as there is ammunition inside.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers: Rock-Throwing Rampage
programme.desc: The troopers scramble to rescue stranded citizens, deal with a man who has brutally assaulted his sister and face a crazed man armed with rocks.

programme.desc: A cougar has a massive abscess drained and an older elephant shows a baby ellie who’s boss.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Franken-Pol

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Albert Ein-swine
programme.desc: For Thanksgiving, Charles decides to cook dinner for the staff at the clinic.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: One Great Dane
programme.desc: It’s an emotional time for the Pols as they say farewell to their beloved Great Dane, Frija.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Finding the Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal this mystery's long-lost secrets.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Who Built Supervillain Island?
programme.desc: A satellite spots a set of huge arrows in the badlands of the American west. A blood red waterfall stains Antarctica's snows. A plague of huge holes in the Siberian landscape.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Monster Graveyard
programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts have discovered a monster graveyard, and this groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: When instruments on the International Space Station suddenly malfunction every time it passes over a mysterious site in the Atlantic Ocean, experts investigate if this eerie behaviours is more than just a tech glitch, but a prophecy of global doomsday.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Evidence
programme.desc: The discovery of extraterrestrial life might face an impossible challenge: the physics of the universe itself. Using cutting-edge technology, experts might be on the verge of a groundbreaking find and the evidence could already be in hand.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: First Second of the Big Bang
programme.desc: The first second of the Universe, the creation of everything when space, time, matter and energy burst into existence. It is the most important second in history, which seals the Universe's fate and defines everything that comes after - including us.

programme.title: Unearthed: Finding Sparta's 300
programme.desc: New discoveries might lead investigators to the legendary group of 300 Spartan warriors who died fighting off one million invading Persians, and using cutting-edge tech, experts reconstruct the lost battlefield to uncover the secrets of their last stand.

programme.title: Unearthed: Wrath of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: New evidence reveals if Attila the Hun was responsible for the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: Summit of the Gods
programme.desc: Go inside the Acropolis, an ancient engineering marvel that has stood above the city of Athens for thousands of years. Follow the scientists working to reveal its hidden mysteries: how it was built, what it looked like, and why it's still standing today.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Examine new discoveries which are revealing the deepest and darkest secrets of Stonehenge, showing how ancient magic, bizarre rituals, and brutal murder built this strange monument.

programme.title: MythBusters: Let There Be Light
programme.desc: Jamie and Adam test a Hollywood lighting myth.

programme.title: MythBusters: The Reddit Special
programme.desc: From the very beginning, fan feedback has been integral to MythBusters. In this episode, the most interactive show on TV has peaked with a Reddit Special where the Internet is in complete control of the editorial.

programme.title: MythBusters: Bullet Baloney
programme.desc: The MythBusters take on five filmic firearm clichés: Will a bent-barreled shot gun fire? Can you fire a gun in space? Will a gun dropped in a deep fryer go off? What weird items will stop a bullet? And does a neon sign really explode when hit by a bullet?

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fireworks Declassified
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes at one of the world's largest fireworks companies, and reveal the explosive secrets and cutting-edge innovations of its world-class pyrotechnics experts.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Biblical Armageddon
programme.desc: Discover the past and future of apocalyptic beliefs, the lengths people will go to ready for the end and the dark side of End Times prophecy.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that will ensue.

programme.desc: An organized ring of motorcycle thieves has been striking every six months, stealing hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of motorcycles in a single night.

programme.desc: An inmate collapses and dies from multiple stab wounds after an altercation inside the cellblock.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Shanked

programme.title: Diabolical: Accident Waiting to Happen
programme.desc: Rainey Morin is a single mom who's finally found her soulmate. Robert Kowalski treats Rainey like a queen and her kids like gold, but beneath his bright veneer is a dark history threatening to wreak havoc.

programme.title: Diabolical: A Life of Lies
programme.desc: Prichard AL is normally a quiet town but when the body of Re'Mano Campbell, a loving father, is found slain in his house the community grows apprehensive. And it'll take the cunning wit of local investigators to unravel the mystery of his murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Michelle Donohue wants a loving and well-off family of her own. She burns through good men, valuing wealth more than love. But when she finally meets Mr. Right she gets a taste of her own medicine, sending her down a path of murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Someone's Lying
programme.desc: On April 17, 2015, a Virginia hunter stumbles upon a grisly discovery in the woods: a woman with an execution style gun shot wound to the back of her head. As detectives begin their investigation, they uncover a twisted web of lies and crimes.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Nine Years in the Shadows
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, CA home in 1988, police investigate the strife and infidelity on both sides of her marriage. But it's a surprising witness who eventually leads police to her killer.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Frozen Waters
programme.desc: When a mother and her two young children mysteriously go missing, her family goes to their home only to discover it empty. Then, two local boys nearby also disappear.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hold the Line
programme.desc: In August 1992, millionaire Tennessee landowner Allen Roberts arrives home to discover his wife is missing. He tells police he received a ransom call for Doe's safe return. Slowly, the town turns on Allen: until police take note of one odd neighbor.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Scene of the Crime
programme.desc: When Brad McGarry is discovered murdered in his Ohio basement, residents in this sleepy coalmining town are left in shock. Detectives suspect robbery but then a friend comes forward and points them in the direction of someone whom they least expected.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Frozen Waters
programme.desc: When a mother and her two young children mysteriously go missing, her family goes to their home only to discover it empty. Then, two local boys nearby also disappear.

programme.desc: In August 1992, millionaire Tennessee landowner Allen Roberts arrives home to discover his wife is missing. He tells police he received a ransom call for Doe's safe return. Slowly, the town turns on Allen: until police take note of one odd neighbor.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Scene of the Crime
programme.desc: When Brad McGarry is discovered murdered in his Ohio basement, residents in this sleepy coalmining town are left in shock. Detectives suspect robbery but then a friend comes forward and points them in the direction of someone whom they least expected.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Nine Years in the Shadows
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, CA home in 1988, police investigate the strife and infidelity on both sides of her marriage. But it's a surprising witness who eventually leads police to her killer.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: Bitter Pills
programme.desc: Tampa grandmother Peggy Mehrman is much loved by friends and family. Peggy is forced to rely on the kindness of strangers when her heath declines, and when Peggy dies in her sleep, her daughter Janice's grief is soon transformed into suspicion.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: House of Horrors
programme.desc: In Sacramento, Dorothea Puente runs a boarding house. Mentally ill Alvaro 'Bert' Montoya is among Dorothea's favorite tenants. Until a terrible stench rises up through the rafters, and Bert unwittingly exposes something sinister… And deadly.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: The Jersey Devil
programme.desc: 16 year-old Brittney Gregory is a star student in Brick Township, New Jersey. When she vanishes one night in 2004, local police begin a search that leads them into a world of dark secrets and dangerous players as they work to solve her disappearance.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Checks and Balances
programme.desc: A prominent psychiatrist and his adult son are killed execution style. When police can't find a suspect, the case goes cold. But when an attempted armored car robbery provides an odd link to the double homicide months later, a motive is revealed.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Code of Silence
programme.desc: In St. Petersburg, Florida, Cabretti Wheeler and his friend Kyle Ellis are killed. When the only eye-witness vanishes, it's up to Cabretti's mom, Lisa Wheeler, to help police solve the case, even if it means risking her own life for justice.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Tragedy on TV
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the events surrounding the murder of Alison Parker and Adam Ward who were shot on live TV. 20/20 shares all new details from the 23-page suicide note Bryce Williams sent as well as a look inside the mind of the killer.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Mystery in Apartment 410
programme.desc: It is a Southern California mystery ripped straight from a Hollywood script, yet the actors in this drama are real, and so are the twists and turns that unfold in solving a double murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Killer Clown?
programme.desc: A bizarre murder shocks a wealthy community when a person dressed like a clown guns down a woman at her front door. Suspicion falls on the victim's husband and his alleged girlfriend, but it would take over twenty years until an arrest is finally made.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Million Dollar Christy
programme.desc: A female boxing Phenom enters a forbidden relationship with her trainer. But when another secret passion bubbles to the surface and she tries to leave his controlling grip, she finds herself fighting for her life.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Book of James
programme.desc: An affair between a married pastor and a member of his flock takes a shocking turn when he proposes a polygamous relationship with his wife. But an unexpected arrival threatens their pledge of secrecy.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Lone Star Lust
programme.desc: A woman enters into an affair with her daughter's grandfather, causing a major rift in the family and eventually leading to a bloody Texas showdown.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Family Matters
programme.desc: Puppy love is thwarted when a teen boy's traditional parents try to keep the young couple apart by moving him to another country. But the distance only serves to make his heart grow fonder and he'll stop at nothing to be reunited with his girl.

programme.title: America's Hidden Bunkers
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind America's secret bunkers. Ranging from backyard boxes to government mini-cities, underground bunkers have been a feature of warfare planning since the dawn of time. They have played an important role in America's history.

programme.title: Alcatraz: Beyond the Rock
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.desc: A look at the giant hidden planet with a gravitational pull so strong that it would literally cause the earth to turn upside down.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nostradamus
programme.desc: Nostradamus' prophecies have predicted some of the most dramatic and tragic events in history with chilling accuracy, and the worst to come. There are many among his followers who say that he was not sealing us to this fate, but warning us against it.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nostradamus
programme.desc: Nostradamus' prophecies have predicted some of the most dramatic and tragic events in history with chilling accuracy, and the worst to come. There are many among his followers who say that he was not sealing us to this fate, but warning us against it.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Planet X
programme.desc: A look at the giant hidden planet with a gravitational pull so strong that it would literally cause the earth to turn upside down.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Battling the Elements
programme.desc: Firefighter Jack Pritchard fearlessly charges into blazing infernos to rescue victims, and when Hurricane Katrina pounded New Orleans, John Keller stepped up to save residents of his apartment building.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Soaring to New Heights
programme.desc: Test pilot Joe Kittinger volunteers to be the first man to parachute jump from the edge of space, and Air Force researcher Dr. John Stapp straps himself into rocket sleds to test the limits of human endurance.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Bulgaria's Murder Service
programme.desc: The crimes perpetrated in the name of Communism remain largely unexplored. Millions of people died in a secret war with the West. Hear the extraordinary story of the Bulgarian secret department called Service Seven (a killer force operating worldwide).

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: A look at the story of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Escaping the Kill Room
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned Double Agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: The Honey Trap
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat; ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Reagan's KGB Agent
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell,' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet Spy war.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Virginia Victorian Home
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to Hot Springs, VA, to salvage mantles, cabinets, sinks and a round window from a late Victorian-style home.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Maryland Strip Mall
programme.desc: The crew returns to Largo, MD, where they harvest items from a sporting goods store at the Boulevard at the Capital Centre. Robert and Grayson salvage the electrical system while Mike, Tay and Ted remove exterior beams for a future cantilever bench.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Dublin Mill
programme.desc: The Dawgs travel to Dublin, Virginia, to help remove a dated water turbine from the historic Belle-Hampton Farm. After a full day of salvage, Mike and Tay return to the shop to build a kitchen island cart.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Apple Barn
programme.desc: The team heads to Winchester, VA, to salvage an abandoned orchard barn but they must pick through years of trash and treasures before they begin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Clearwater Camp
programme.desc: The team take on a cabin in Industry, ME, that hasn't been touched since the 1970's. Loads of issues arise once the snow melts and they start digging in.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Looking Out for Lava Tubes in Kona
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are on the hunt to find an empty lot with great ocean views. They want to build a spec home on the property that they can turn around and sell in the coming year.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Skylight to the Stars and a Stunning Free-Form Lanai
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler build a brand new house in an upcountry area of the Big Island. Skylights are placed throughout the home, including a giant one in the master bedroom that will allow the homeowners to sleep under the stars.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: A Pool With An Ocean View
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler fly to Maui to get inspiration for renovating a vacation rental property back on the Big Island.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Ocean View Open House
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are ready to sell the first house they ever built in Hawaii, but the Ocean View house needs some freshening up first, including replacing a rotted-out back lanai.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Lava Stamp of Approval
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler create a custom lava-stamp driveway and front lanai that add major curb appeal to a spec home in the Palisades area of Kona.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Refreshing Pool Renovation
programme.desc: The Dickinsons revitalize an algae-filled pool. Diandra finds the perfect glass tile to replace the outdated ceramic waterline tiles, while Tyler fixes the cracked pool deck and builds a stained Douglas fir fence around it.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Flipping a 1970s Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler flip a 1970s fixer-upper to get it ready for a broker's open. They focus on maximizing the ocean views by designing a new floor plan for the kitchen, and adding a thin cable railing on the lanai to open up the view.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Cashing in on Curb Appeal
programme.desc: The Dickinsons' strategy to attract potential buyers to a spec home with the curb appeal of a lava stamp driveway has paid off. A realtor has clients who already want to look at the house, but there's still so much work left to do.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Building Alaska, the New Generation
programme.desc: A new generation of builders tackles the Alaskan wilds to build off-the-grid cabins. First-time builder Nick faces some harsh realities when he can't use the trees on his build site for lumber. Brannon's team develops a unique foundation system.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Hard Work Beats Talent
programme.desc: Reality sets in for first-time extreme cabin builder Nick Blanco in Alaska as he fights the tides trying to retrieve pylons for his foundation. Brannon's team gets stuck on the muddy trail bringing in more build materials.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Noah's Barge
programme.desc: Jere, Ben and Tim put the finishing touches on the biggest project they've undertaken: building a 112-foot floating barge. They struggle with transporting it to the water, and hurricane-force winds change their plans.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Stuck in Shelikof
programme.desc: Nick experiences firsthand just how dangerous living in Alaska can be while hunting for driftwood to build his fishing lodge and warehouse. Jere and Ben's 112-foot barge starts its half-mile journey to the water.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain, Rain, Go Away
programme.desc: Rain and a muddy trail continue to slow down Brannon's cabin build, but despite their dampened spirits, the gang is able to haul the windows across the two-mile trail. Jere and Ben finally get the barge launched.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Nacho, Nacho Man
programme.desc: Noah Cappe tries some of the wackiest and wildest nacho combinations on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bacon 2: The Sequel
programme.desc: Bacon is the star of its own blockbuster sequel and host Noah Cappe is at the front of line to savor even more bacon-tastic fairground favs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Devil Wears Pasta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets things started in Florida at the Okeechobee County Fair where he samples the Hot Wing Grilled Cheese, the Sweet Bacon Devil Burger and the made-in-Florida Strawberry Margarita Funnel Cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bite Club
programme.desc: Noah Cappe celebrates the arrival of spring in Winchester, Va., at the Shenandoah Apple Blossom Festival. He starts the day with the Cowboy Breakfast and ends it with Caramel Apple Tots.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Southern Charm
programme.desc: Rogers checks out the best rich, hearty, home-style cooking straight from the South.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow
programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Extra Crispy
programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Maui, Hi
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Hawaii, where he embraces the aloha spirit and takes on a whopping three-and-a-half-pound burger.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin, Texas
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing trek across America brings him to Austin, TX. He starts with a 2-pound barbecue behemoth packed with every meat, sauce and side on the menu.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Burlington, VT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to the small town of Burlington, Vermont, for some mammoth eats, including a beer-infused bagel feast and a 3.5-pound breakfast sandwich challenge.

programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Donuts For Days
programme.desc: Anyway you fry it, America loves donuts, and these three shops are a cut above the rest. There are vegan delights at Donut Friend in Los Angeles, with everything from berries and mint to donut sandwiches.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Deep Freeze
programme.desc: These frozen treats go far beyond vanilla, chocolate and strawberry scoots. In Honolulu, Shimazu Store pushes the boundaries of shave ice, a uniquely Hawaiian treat. In New York, Ice and Vice uses unconventional ingredients to create edgy desserts.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: L.A. Sweets
programme.desc: We've got the fried, the frozen, and the fabulous! It's a tour of the sweetest spots in Los Angeles. At Republique, French pastries are expertly crafted, and totally addictive.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Game Changers
programme.desc: Visit three of NYC's game changers, putting a new spin on old favorites. At Dominique Ansel Kitchen time is the secret ingredient.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Low Country Love
programme.desc: If you are looking for some Low Country Love in the form of a sweet treat, look no further than Charleston, South Carolina. At Callie's Hot Little Biscuit, they are baking up, over the top, warm doughy rounds like the Cinnamon Biscuit.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Start
programme.desc: At Holy Donut in Portland, Maine, the dough for their Maine blueberry donuts and sweet potato ginger glazed donuts includes mashed potatoes.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Three-foot-tall Fairy Cake
programme.desc: Michelle is producing a six-foot-long miniature steam train made out of cake; Eloise is tasked with creating a three-foot-tall fairy cake for a toddler's birthday; Karisha is commissioned to make a wedding cake with nearly 900 edible iced flowers.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Leather-Bound Cake
programme.desc: A cake that looks identical to four, legal-bound volumes for a publishing company; a cake that is the same shape and size of a Shetland pony; a wedding cake specialist creates a cake that is over two foot tall.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Cakes in Wonderland
programme.desc: Molly Robbins likes to push the boundaries. She's been asked to create a five-tier cake themed around Alice in Wonderland, complete with an edible Cheshire cat and a pouring teapot.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Ball Gown Celebration Cake
programme.desc: In Lancashire, Molly Robbins has a very tall order: a celebration cake for a flamboyant customer to help him celebrate 35 years as a drag artist. The cake will be a life-size ball gown, complete with 50 edible peacock feathers and 3000 gold flowers.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Carnivals, Cityscapes and Glowing Cakes
programme.desc: Romance combines with rides and roller coasters on a carnival-themed wedding cake complete with a tunnel of love.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Surprise Filled Cakes
programme.desc: A rancher's birthday party calls for a pair of larger-than-life cowboy boots. Next, the Texas Reptile Zoo celebrates with a realistic snake cake that blows everyone's mind. Finally, two special cakes are filled with hidden surprises.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Gravity-Defying Musical Cakes
programme.desc: A 50s-themed cake with a working jukebox is music to everyone's ears and an out-of-this-world wedding cake gets filled with hand-sculpted edible zombies! Next, an alligator groom's cake looks like it crawled right out of the swamp.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Out of This World Upside Down Cakes
programme.desc: An upside-down wedding cake hanging from a chandelier is covered in sparkly rhinestones for the big day, plus an edible truck jumps over a Vegas ghost town. The planet Earth is made of cake, and one baker creates a realistic, 3D motorcycle cake.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Matchmaking Party
programme.desc: Four bakers get in the mood in an aphrodisiac inspired cupcake challenge. One baker makes the judges swoon, while another totally turns off Florian and Candace.

programme.desc: Gary will do anything to get the new treats SpongeBob brings home. Mr. Puff enters SpongeBob in the demolition derby.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Good Krabby Name/ Move It or Lose It
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick advertise the Krusty Krab. Then, petitions are circulated to see which restaurant will get bulldozed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: License to Milkshake/ Squid Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns his milkshake license has expired, and is forced to go back to the milkshake academy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karen 2.0/ Inspongeiac
programme.desc: Plankton's wife is replaced by a better version at work; Spongebob can't sleep.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It Came From Goo Lagoon
programme.desc: A giant goo bubble emerges from Goo Lagoon and threatens all of Bikini Bottom. Plankton plans to use the bubble for his own evil ends.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: The Power and the Peril!
programme.desc: Ian Malcolm returns to the island to help with strange power surges throughout the park.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jellyfishing
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick decide to take Squidward jellyfishing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away. When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Graveyard Shift/ Krusty Love
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab is now open 24 hours a day; Mr. Krabs is smitten with Ms. Puff.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid on Strike/ Sandy, SpongeBob and the Worm
programme.desc: SpongeBob is petrified by a huge worm and tells Sandy, who drags him into confronting it.

programme.desc: When the health inspector comes, Krabs tries to get the joint up to code.
